Name: Swapfiets
Description:
Swapfiets is the world’s first ‘bicycle as a service’ company. Founded 2014 in the Netherlands, the scale-up quickly developed being one of the leading micro mobility providers in Europe with a total of over 280.000 members in the Netherlands, Germany, Belgium, Denmark, France, Spain, Austria and the UK. 

The concept of Swapfiets is quite simple: 

For a monthly subscription fee, Swapfiets members receive a fully functional bike or e-Bike for their own use. 

If needed, a repair service is available within 10min in store to repair or directly swap the two-wheeler at no additional cost.

At F10, we understand that luxury is not just about the car you drive, but the service you receive. Our fleet includes the latest models from top brands such as Lamborghini, Mercedes-Benz, Rolls-Royce, and more. Whether you’re looking to make a grand entrance at an event, enjoy a weekend getaway, or simply experience the thrill of driving a high-end vehicle, we have the perfect car for you.

Our team is committed to delivering unparalleled customer service. From the moment you make your reservation to the time you return your vehicle, we ensure a seamless and enjoyable experience. We offer flexible rental terms, competitive pricing, and personalized service to meet your unique needs.

Discover the difference with F10 where luxury meets performance. Let us help you turn every journey into an unforgettable adventure.

Name: Locauto
Description:
Locauto Group rappresenta la one-stop station nella mobilità in Italia. Una realtà solida e in crescita, 100% italiana, con oltre 40 anni di esperienza nel settore del noleggio a breve, medio e lungo termine di auto e veicoli commerciali attraverso un network di oltre 100 uffici di noleggio nei principali aeroporti, stazioni ferroviarie e città in tutta Italia. 

Dal 2013, Locauto è partner per l'Italia della multinazionale Enterprise Holdings, leader mondiale nel noleggio auto. 

È stata la prima società di noleggio in Europa a lanciare ELEFAST il sistema digitale full self-service per gestire il noleggio in autonomia senza tempi di attesa direttamente da app Locautorent e a presentare nel 2020 SMART CHECK-IN il servizio per noleggiare auto e veicoli commerciali direttamente in parcheggio per un’esperienza di noleggio paper-free, veloce e sicura. 

Nel 2023 nasce MYLOCAUTO FRIENDS, il primo programma loyalty multiprodotto e multicanale, gratuito e cross-sell, con sconti e vantaggi progressivi in base al numero di noleggi effettuati.

Moreover, the company seeks to reimagine the perception of mobility across Europe. Name: CityBee
Description:
After more than a decade, CityBee emerged as one of the key players in the car-sharing landscape across the CEE region. Our operations span three countries: Lithuania, Latvia, and Estonia. The primary goal is to enable people to travel freely without the necessity of car ownership, thereby contributing to reduced traffic congestion and lowered CO2 emissions within cities. Thanks to the car-sharing services, as many as 15 thousand fewer cars now fill the streets and parking lots, showcasing the substantial influence of a solitary shared vehicle that can effectively replace the necessity for 15 privately owned cars!

CityBee car sharing was founded by Modus Group, Netherland capital based group of companies. The Modus Group's activities consist of 4 main businesses: automotive, mobility services, renewable energy, and investment fund management.

Name: Motum srl
Description:
Prima ancora di essere un’azienda specializzata nel noleggio di auto e moto nel lungo e breve periodo, Motum è un’idea. Frutto del lavoro di una squadra con un obiettivo in comune: crescere insieme muovendosi all’unisono verso le mete che ci prefissiamo giorno dopo giorno.

Che si tratti di aziende, di professionisti o di privati, riusciamo a garantire un’assistenza a 360°, in qualsiasi momento e per qualunque esigenza. Liberandoti da ogni pensiero legato alla “proprietà” di un veicolo, così da poterti dedicare al solo piacere di guida.

Scegliendo Motum, infatti, avrai un mezzo dedicato ai tuoi spostamenti sempre nuovo, senza doverti preoccupare della svalutazione o di rivendere l’usato. Inoltre, nel canone mensile (che non prevede alcuna maxirata finale) sono incluse assicurazione RCA, imposte, tassa di proprietà, manutenzione e riparazioni, cambio pneumatici, soccorso stradale, supporto telefonico no stop e tanto altro.

Noi consulenti della mobilità sogniamo un mondo in cui muoversi è una passeggiata.
Vieni a farti un giro in Motum e avrai una sola domanda da porti nel momento di dover scegliere la tua auto, la tua moto o il tuo veicolo commerciale: perché comprare se si può noleggiare?

Name: Mobility Service Electric Renting
Description:
Lideramos la transición a la movilidad eléctrica para empresas en España.

En EV Renting somos el partner estratégico que impulsa a empresas y autónomos hacia una movilidad 100% eléctrica, sostenible y eficiente.

Sabemos que electrificar una flota puede generar dudas: el compromiso a largo plazo, la inversión inicial o la rápida evolución tecnológica. Por eso, hemos creado un ecosistema de soluciones que eliminan barreras y minimizan los riesgos de la transición.

Nuestras soluciones para tu negocio:

► Renting360 Flexible: Nuestra propuesta más innovadora. Accede a vehículos eléctricos de ocasión con una permanencia mínima de solo 3 meses. Una opción sin ataduras, económica y con disponibilidad inmediata, ideal para probar la tecnología, adaptarse a proyectos temporales o crecer sin compromisos a largo plazo.

► Renting de Vehículos Nuevos: Te ofrecemos los últimos modelos de coches y furgonetas 100% eléctricos del mercado con las condiciones más competitivas para contratos a largo plazo, asegurando que tu empresa siempre esté a la vanguardia.

► EV Consulting: No solo te proporcionamos vehículos; te ofrecemos un servicio de consultoría experta. Te acompañamos en el diseño y la ejecución de un plan de electrificación a medida para tu flota, optimizando costes y soluciones de recarga.

Nuestra misión se basa en la filosofía "Reduce, Recycle & ReUse". Fomentamos la economía circular dando una segunda vida a los vehículos y contribuyendo activamente a un futuro más verde y responsable.

¿Estás listo para liderar el cambio en tu sector? Contacta con nuestro equipo para una asesoría personalizada y descubre cómo la movilidad eléctrica puede transformar tu negocio.

#MovilidadEléctrica #RentingElectrico #Sostenibilidad #RentingParaEmpresas #ElectrificacionDeFlotas #EV #VehiculoElectrico #RentingFlexible #Renting360 #FurgonetasElectricas #ConsultoriaEV

Name: Peerby
Description:
Met Peerby kun je de dingen die je nodig hebt lenen en huren van mensen uit je buurt.Waarom veel geld uitgeven aan dingen die je maar af en toe nodig hebt?

Peerby.com is 's werelds eerste peer-to-peer-deelplatform dat actief aanbod creëert door rond te vragen via Facebook, pushberichten en e-mail.

//
Peerby enables you to borrow and rent the things you need from people in your neighborhood. 

Why spend hundreds of dollars on things you only need once or once in a while?

Imagine an ordinary street with the homes of roughly 100 families. Try to imagine how many durable consumer goods are kept in all these houses: power tools, lawn mowers, barbecues, sports gear, camping equipment, bikes, cars, motor cycles, etc. What would happen if we could make these products easily accessible to all the people in this neighborhood? Doe these people really need a hundred lawn mowers? Wouldn't five be enough?

Peerby.com is the world's first peer-to-peer sharing platform that actively creates supply by asking around through Facebook, push notification and e-mail.

Name: irentout.com
Description:
irentout.com is more of a campaign to promote a shared economy business model. We must use any resource to its maximum or at least pass it on to the next user. We are a one-stop solution to manage surplus across INDIA to maximise returns more efficiently and strategically.

Rental products are a growing resource for consumers to try out new products from their favourite brands and to be more sustainable and price-conscious in their usage behaviour. Our shared rental market allows smart consumers and organizations to strategize their usage practices.

We as an organisation want to thank all our customers who have contributed knowingly or unknowingly to Green Earth by going with rental products. Today, many consumers are concerned with sustainability and want to be environmentally responsible. Nearly half of the survey respondents agree that they’re renting products because they consider themselves who wants to be asset-lite and avoid products being dumped only after one use into a landfill. While consumers are price-conscious, they are also clearly concerned with how their usage behaviour impacts the planet. More importantly, many consumers understand the connection between renting products and being sustainable by monitoring their overall carbon footprint.

Name: Being Well Cold
Description:
At Being Well Cold we believe that cold is more than a passing trend. It is a tool for clarity, resilience and genuine wellness.

We are Scotland’s first dedicated cold plunge company with a mission to make cold therapy affordable and accessible. Our XL Cold Tub is designed for daily use and every Starter Pack includes the essentials to get you started. We keep it simple, effective and free from unnecessary extras so you can focus on the experience.

But this brand is not only about products. From the start we have built Being Well Cold with purpose. One pound from every sale goes directly to Tiny Changes, the Scottish mental health charity supporting youth mental health. Every customer is also welcomed into The Cold Crew, our community space for resources, connection and ongoing support. As a Certified Cold Water Therapy Coach, Damien & Lauren lead with science backed guidance, practical coaching and a passion for helping people build the habit.

Cold exposure is not easy and that is exactly why it works. Three minutes in the water can change your state, shift your mood and remind you that you are capable of more than you think. Whether you are an athlete chasing recovery, a parent seeking calm, or simply someone who wants to feel more awake and alive, we are here to help you use the cold as a tool for wellness.

Being Well Cold is not another imported wellness fad. We are rooted in Scotland but ship across the UK. We keep our pricing honest and our design straightforward because we believe wellness should not be out of reach.

Join us and discover Cold That Means Something.

Name: Relly
Description:
Tech Gadgets and Household Appliances are becoming increasingly expensive, and potentially unaffordable for the common person. And to top it off, we're throwing away gadgets more than ever - E waste is one of the fastest growing waste categories, with only 17% of it recycled in 2022.

At Relly, we aim to solve for these challenges through rental subscriptions. Relly offers a wide range of devices - including Phones and Laptops, Wearables, Audio, Gaming consoles, Household Appliances, and many more. And in 3 easy steps, customers can simply rent their favorite device or gadget for however long they'd like, and at the end of the rental period they can choose to continue renting, swap it with something else, or simply buy the product.

Relly's business model of renting out Tech products across their life cycle allows maximum value to be extracted from each product, and significantly reduces e-waste. And Relly looks to transform the way we own, use, and dispose electronic products in the future.

Podés encontrar todo nuestro catálogo en el siguiente link: www.n9.cl/pulprentaluy

FAQ
Cómo alquilar.
Alquilar equipos es muy sencillo. Lo único que debés hacer es dirigirte a la sección de contacto y contarnos  qué equipos del catálogo deseas alquilar y por cuántos días. También te vamos a pedir el nombre del proyecto y del productor responsable del alquiler.
A partir de ahí nos comunicaremos contigo para precisar todos los detalles.

¿Los equipos están asegurados?
Los equipos no salen asegurados, y no es necesario que los asegures, a excepción de algunos ítems puntuales. En caso de que alquiles algo que deba ser asegurado o que quieras hacerlo por tu tranquilidad, podemos instruirte para facilitar el proceso. 

¿Cuáles son las formas de pago? 
Los pagos se realizan por transferencia bancaria a una cuenta ITAÚ. Una vez que se confirme la reserva te facilitaremos el número de cuenta.

¿Qué horarios manejamos? 
Los horarios del cine no son convencionales y por lo tanto los nuestros tampoco. Una vez confirmada la reserva, el equipo se puede levantar y devolver en los horarios que le funcionen de mejor manera a la producción.

¿Hay descuentos para proyectos estudiantiles?
Efectivamente. Pulp Rental es una rentadora que apuesta fuertemente por los nuevos talentos y por eso tenemos un descuento del 50% para proyectos estudiantiles.

Name: Viavay Mobility
Description:
Viavay Mobility è un’agenzia di brokeraggio specializzata nel noleggio a lungo termine. 

Affianchiamo aziende, PMI, professionisti, privati e realtà del terzo settore nella gestione della mobilità, con soluzioni costruite su misura e un supporto costante nel tempo.
Grazie ai mandati ufficiali con i principali player del settore, offriamo un ventaglio di proposte ampio e competitivo, pensato per esigenze diverse: dalle flotte aziendali ai veicoli commerciali, fino ai mezzi allestiti per la disabilità.

Il nostro approccio si basa su ascolto, consulenza e attenzione reale: dal primo contatto alla gestione quotidiana del veicolo, ci siamo sempre. 

Perché per noi la mobilità non è mai solo un servizio, ma una relazione di fiducia destinata a durare.
Contattaci per scoprire come il noleggio a lungo termine può trasformare la gestione della tua mobilità aziendale in un asset strategico.

Name: ANOA Shipping Tag
Description:
A reusable SHIPPING tag that allows shippers to easily and securely ship their handled baggage with major parcel carriers like FedEx, UPS or DHL.

Designed Specifically For:
- Companies, Salesmen or Technicians who ship hard shell cases
- Trade show displays
- Parents who need to send their kid’s duffels and trunks to/from sleep-away camp
- Golfers, Skiers, Musicians
- Cruise ship passengers who prefer to travel light

Create outbound AND return labels at the same time from home and place both in the PVC pouch. Have the carrier collect from home in advance of your arrival at destination. When it’s time to go, discard the used label and you have the pre-printed return label displayed for the trip home.

Three layers of connection – ensure your shipping tag and associated documents stay connected to your baggage. 

Made of 1680 Ballistic Nylon, the 3 connection layers (Snaps, Velcro, and Strap with Buckle) provide exceptional strength. Couriers and transport systems where multiple pieces are rubbing against each other can be pretty rough on plastic sleeves that house shipping labels. Once the label is gone, the package has no recipient. The ANOA Shipping Tag ensures shipping labels and associated documents remain attached to baggage.

Instead of using expensive 3rd-party shippers (who use the same carriers), take control of your own destiny and pay less. Get a FedEx, UPS or DHL account and ship whenever & wherever you want, using the ANOA Shipping Tag!

Dazu gehört ein Onlineshop für E-Scooter, E-Roller und E-Motorräder sowie ein Showroom mit eigener Werkstatt in Vechta. Außerdem sind wir jobroller-Fachhändler. Im Prinzip funktioniert jobroller wie das bekannte Modell „Job-Räder“: Die Arbeitnehmer*innen suchen sich einen jobroller bei einem jobroller-Fachhändler in ihrer Nähe aus. Möglich sind E-Scooter, E-Roller und sogar E-Motorräder. Die Arbeitgeber*innen leasen den jobroller und überlassen ihn den Mitarbeiter*innen. Die können das Elektro-Zweirad für den Weg zur Arbeit und in der Freizeit nutzen und zahlen dafür monatliche Raten, die vom Bruttolohn abgezogen werden. Der jobroller per Gehaltsumwandlung ist durch den Steuervorteil deutlich günstiger als ein E-Roller-Barkauf. Nach 36 Monaten kann der jobroller übernommen werden oder man steigt einfach auf einen neuen Wunsch-E-Roller um. Darüber hinaus genießt der Leasingnehmer während der Laufzeit Rundumschutz mit der jobroller-Vollkaskoversicherung inklusive Schutzbrief.

MNIEJ TO WIĘCEJ – Dbamy o przestrzeń, bo mniej zabawek w otoczeniu dziecka, to więcej koncentracji i uwagi skupionej na zabawie, a przede wszystkim rozwijanie skrzydeł kreatywności

It is important for us to fulfill all customer requests. For this reason, we have collected cars in the fleet for those who prefer restraint or want to stand out and emphasize their high social status.

• dynamic sports cars;
• powerful off-road vehicles;
• business class models.

Customer support is provided 24/7. At any time you can contact us and get help. We always act on the client's side and try to find a solution that will be beneficial to him.

Welkom bij LittleTopia, uw betrouwbare partner in de wonderlijke wereld van ouderschap. Wij zijn Djorhia en Jeffrey, en dit project is voor ons meer dan alleen een bedrijf - het is een missie geboren uit persoonlijke ervaring.

Ons avontuur begon met de geboorte van onze prachtige dochter Jadzia, die een moeilijke start kende. Die eerste dagen, weken en maanden waren een tijd van veel liefde, maar ook van bezorgdheid en angst. Zo kwamen we op het pad van de SNOO Smart Sleeper Bassinet - een innovatief bedje dat ons leven als jonge ouders positief veranderde en Jadzia door deze uitdagende tijden hielp.

Geïnspireerd door deze ervaring en gedreven door onze wens om andere ouders te helpen, werd LittleTopia geboren. Onze missie is om de SNOO Smart Sleeper Bassinet toegankelijk te maken voor iedereen in Nederland.

Vanuit ons thuis in Vianen willen we ouders een helpende hand bieden in hun grootste avontuur - het grootbrengen van hun kinderen. Wij staan klaar om te ondersteunen met kwaliteitsproducten die jouw wereld en die van je kindje een beetje mooier maken.

Bij LittleTopia geloven we dat elke ouder een superheld is. Laten we deze reis samen voortzetten.

Name: Care Detergents
Description:
Care Detergents Private Limited (CDPL) is one of India’s fast-growing consumer goods companies, headquartered in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh. Founded in 2003 by Mr. Jitendra Kataria and Mr. Kamal Kataria, CDPL carries forward the legacy of their father, Shri Vishan Das Kataria, who has been in the detergent business since 1980.

For over two decades, CDPL has built a strong presence across Uttar Pradesh and neighboring states, specializing in the sales and marketing of essential household products. Its portfolio includes detergent powder and cake, dish wash bars, and toilet soap.

Flagship Brands:

Vidisha – Detergent powder & cake

Soro – Dish wash bar

Zio – Toilet soap

Vidisha is now a well-established brand known for quality, effectiveness, and affordability. Soro and Zio are also rapidly gaining market share.

CDPL’s success is rooted in its deep understanding of consumer needs, backed by a state-of-the-art in-house R&D and testing facility. A team of skilled professionals ensures every product meets high standards of performance, safety, and value.

With a growing distribution network of 350+ distributors and dealers, CDPL operates from its Kanpur head office and branch offices in Ahmedabad, Gwalior, Satna, and Ghaziabad. The company is actively expanding into new states across India.

Committed to responsible marketing, CDPL promotes its brands through print, radio, TV, digital media, outdoor advertising, and selective event sponsorships. Vidisha’s campaigns have been endorsed by renowned personalities, including Bollywood actress Karishma Kapoor.

CDPL continues to focus on delivering high-quality, cost-effective, and consumer-friendly products that build trust and support everyday household needs.

Name: I-Hem srl
Description:
Transforming the hair salon industry with I-HEM's innovative solutions! 

I-HEM is a startup that aims to revolutionize the hair salon industry by offering sustainable solutions and processes for hair salons. Our goal is to create a hair salon of the future that not only provides exceptional hair services but also contributes to a more sustainable world.

We are proud to introduce our internationally patented product Farian - a hair coloring system that uses real-time hair analysis and AI technology to deliver the exact chosen color through augmented reality. Farian collects numerous scientific data on the bio-chemical characteristics of hair, processes the data, and chooses optimal formulas to achieve the desired color, all while providing an engaging and unique customer experience.

Farian is a system that is directly installable in hair salons and does not require any specialized support. It contains a highly complex integrated system composed of numerous components, making it a revolutionary product in the hair salon industry.

Join us on our mission to transform hair salons into sustainable spaces with innovative solutions. Together, we can create a better world for all. #IHEM #Farian #HairSalon #InnovativeSolutions #Sustainability #AugmentedReality #AItechnology #CustomerExperience #RevolutionizeHairIndustry

Description:
**Ammave** is a holistic wellness brand dedicated to nurturing the mind, body, and soul through the wisdom of Ayurveda. Our mission is to empower individuals to achieve optimal health and well-being by reconnecting with nature's timeless remedies. Rooted in the ancient traditions of Ayurveda, Ammave offers a curated selection of premium, plant-based supplements that blend time-honored ingredients with modern wellness practices.

At Ammave, we believe that true wellness is a harmonious balance of physical vitality, mental clarity, and emotional resilience. Our products are crafted with this philosophy in mind, using only the highest quality organic and sustainably sourced ingredients. Each formulation is designed to support the body's natural processes, promoting longevity, vitality, and overall well-being.

Our flagship products, *Vana* and *Santi*, embody the essence of Ayurvedic healing. *Vana* is a rejuvenating supplement that harnesses the power of Organic Amla, Acai, Ginger Root, and Rhodiola Rosea to restore vitality, enhance immune function, improve skin health, and support digestion. *Santi*, the essence of tranquility, is designed to promote relaxation, mental clarity, and stress adaptation, furthering our commitment to holistic health.

Ammave is more than just a wellness brand; it is a community dedicated to inspiring and supporting each individual's journey towards a balanced and fulfilling life. We are committed to sustainability, ensuring that our products not only benefit our customers but also respect the environment and the communities involved in their production.

Join us in embracing the holistic approach to wellness that Ayurveda has to offer. Let Ammave guide you on your path to rejuvenation, vitality, and inner peace.

Name: PERMA ENTERPRISE CORP.
Description:
PERMA is a lifestyle jigsaw puzzle brand that brings happiness into modern homes through beautifully designed, emotionally engaging, environmentally sustainable, and decor-ready puzzles.

Founded in 2023 and headquartered in Vancouver, PERMA blends positive psychology, minimal aesthetics, and cultural storytelling into every puzzle. Our signature frameable puzzle series is designed not only to be played, but displayed, turning quiet moments into lasting art.

We’ve grown from a local idea into a cross-border business with a million CAD revenue and expanding distribution across Asia and North America. Our design team collaborates with illustrators from top global art schools, including Emily Carr, Tsinghua University, Central Saint Martins, UBC, and SVA. Our puzzles are already top sellers on The Red Note and Taobao, and are now entering Shopify, Amazon, offline retail, and lifestyle concept stores across Canada.

PERMA has won major recognition, including the 2024 Chunhui Cup Award (China Ministry of Education) and the “Model Youth Award” in Vancouver.

We’re also innovating in education, building puzzle-based learning tools for neurodiverse children in partnership with North American institutions.

We are currently seeking long-term distributors, cultural collaborators, and retail partners who believe in the power of art, storytelling, and meaningful products. Join us in creating “PERMA Corners” around the world — spaces where puzzles connect people, memory, and joy.

Name: Ontogenetics Inc.
Description:
Ontogenetics is the maker of the Sleepynest Calming Cradle, a revolutionary new product that helps calm fussy babies, substantially reducing crying and increasing sleep. The cradle mimics the familiar sensation of being in the womb, including the motion of the womb, the feeling of the womb and mother’s heartbeat to provide the familiar environment a baby has been in for 9 months.  The Sleepynest Calming Cradle uses the actual mother’s biometric information to customize the motion and sound so as to replicate the womb environment as much as possible, creating impressive outcomes for both babies and parents.

In clinical studies, the motion and sound used in the Sleepynest Calming Cradle has been shown to reduce crying by over 63%, increase how long babies sleep, is associated with accelerated neurological development, increased weight gain and babies sleep through the night 20% sooner and 24% more reliably.

The Sleepynest Calming Cradle is also designed to be safe and easy to use. It is made with non-toxic materials and has been rigorously tested to ensure that it is safe for babies. The simple, one-button operation and the App makes it easy to use, even when you're feeling sleep-deprived and overwhelmed.

Name: Uncle.ke
Description:
Uncle is transforming access to essential household appliances and furniture in Kenya, enabling people to subscribe to these products monthly instead of buying them. 

Uncle’s mission is to democratize access to better living standards across Africa. We believe that modern, functional appliances and furniture should be accessible to everyone without the burden of high upfront costs.

With Uncle, subscribers get access to a wide range of household appliances and soon, stylish furniture and consumer electronics, all on a flexible, monthly rental basis. We offer fast, free delivery and professional installation, making it easy for you to enjoy our products without hassle. Our flexible options allow you to rent or buy, and you can upgrade or downgrade anytime. We provide affordable solutions with low upfront costs and flexible payment plans, ensuring that high-quality home essentials are within everyone’s reach. Additionally, our complimentary repair and maintenance services keep your items in top condition.

Uncle is a pioneer in building the circular economy in Africa. Our business model promotes sustainability by renting and refurbishing products, reducing waste, and extending the lifespan of appliances and furniture. Once a product rental period has ended, users can return the product free of charge, extend the rental, or exchange it for something else.

Learn more about how Uncle is changing the way people access home essentials in Kenya and join us in building a sustainable future.

www.uncle.ke

Name: Eco Bug India
Description:
Eco Bug – Redefining Everyday Sustainability
Eco Bug is an emerging sustainable brand committed to transforming day-to-day essentials into eco-friendly alternatives. Our mission is simple yet impactful: to replace conventional, wasteful products with sustainable, reusable, and biodegradable options that drive meaningful change over the next five years.

 Our Product Line
We specialize in eco-conscious, practical products that consumers use regularly, making sustainability an effortless lifestyle choice. Our current and upcoming product range includes:

Bamboo Toothbrushes: Biodegradable and plastic-free oral care solutions.

Cotton Swabs: Made from bamboo and organic cotton, offering a sustainable alternative to plastic swabs.

Combs and Hair Brushes: Crafted from bamboo and other eco-friendly materials, promoting waste-free grooming.

Reusable Bottles: Durable, BPA-free bottles designed to reduce single-use plastic waste.

Cutlery and Tableware: Eco-friendly, reusable, and compostable cutlery made from bamboo, wood, or wheat straw.

Other Daily Essentials: We continuously expand our range with simple yet high-impact products that promote sustainable living.

 Our Vision
At Eco Bug, we believe that small, consistent lifestyle changes can create a massive market shift. By offering affordable, accessible, and high-quality sustainable products, we aim to:

Reduce plastic waste: By replacing single-use plastic products with reusable or biodegradable alternatives.

Promote conscious consumption: Encouraging consumers to make eco-friendly choices in their daily lives.

Drive market transformation: Establishing Eco Bug as a leading name in sustainable consumer goods over the next five years.

 Our Commitment
We are dedicated to ethical sourcing, environmentally friendly packaging, and transparent business practices. Our products are designed to be durable, functional, and sustainable, ensuring they meet consumer needs while reducing environmental impact.

Name: 1SHARING
Description:
1SHARING è il portale interamente dedicato alla voglia di promuovere la cultura dello sharing, intesa come community del noleggio a breve termine. 
Amiamo le novità, il piacere del consumo, ma siamo attenti alla sostenibilità e crediamo che allungare il più possibile la vita dei prodotti, comporti un risparmio di risorse di ogni tipo e faccia bene sia all’ambiente che alle finanze.
Ecco ciò in cui crediamo:
	•	Usare ciò che serve, quando serve, dove serve. 
	•	Pagare il giusto prezzo, per quello che è l’effettivo utilizzo di un prodotto.
	•	Guadagnare quando non lo si utilizza più.
Abbracciare l'economia della condivisione, significa aumentare la varietà di utilizzo dei prodotti a parità di costo. Più cresce la community, più si popolano le offerte e più aumenta l’utilità della piattaforma sia per chi è interessato a guadagnare, sia per chi desidera risparmiare.

Name: YACHTS & GO
Description:
Tenemos muy claro que la historia también forma parte de una empresa, y por lo tanto nosotros estamos muy orgullosos de poderla contar.

En 1996 se fundó la sociedad Moaqua, SL con el ánimo de ser un Dealer en la Costa Brava de la prestigiosa marca Canadiense Bombardier.

Una vez conseguido este objetivo, ese mismo año con el nombre comercial de Jets Marivent L`Escala abre sus puertas como representante oficial de la marca Bombardier.

Esa iniciativa que a tenido a traves de los años Moaqua S.L, en hacer y desarrollar actividades diferentes, fue lo que impulsó a esa pequeña Empresa a entrar en el mundo de la Nàutica Deportiva.

En el año 2006 la Sociedad Moaqua, SL empieza a especializarse en el mundo de la Náutica Deportiva, siendo el representante de zona de la marca italiana Primatist By Bruno Abatte.

Al poco tiempo el gerente de la empresa Ricard Andreu fué socio fundador de la empresa Marivent Yachts, importadora de grandes marcas de la naútica internacional.

Actualmente a través de la marca YACHTS & GO sigue apostando por representar embarcaciones diferentes, con unas líneas y unos códigos de elegancia y navegación muy especiales.

Es curioso que muchos de los actuales clientes de YACHTS & GO en su momento fueron propietarios de moto acuática y sport boat, hoy nos sentimos muy orgullosos de poder contar con todos estos clientes que año tras año han confiado en nuestro saber hacer. Más de veinticinco años nos avalan.

Name: REIT
Description:
Welcome to REIT, 
The ultimate destination for all your rental needs. We're revolutionizing the way people access and share products by providing a platform where anyone can rent anything to anyone. Whether it's fashion, electronics, home goods, or real estate, REIT is here to make renting simple, accessible, and empowering.

At REIT, we believe in the power of a sharing economy. Our innovative C2C (consumer-to-consumer) and B2C (business-to-consumer) model allows both individuals and businesses to list their products for rent, offering a convenient and cost-effective alternative to ownership. 

We also facilitate direct donations of unused items to those in need, fostering a community of compassion and sustainability.

Our mission is to create a seamless rental experience that enhances lives and supports a sustainable future. By connecting people directly, we eliminate the hassle of intermediaries and promote a culture of sharing and trust. Join us in embracing a new way of living – where convenience meets compassion, and every transaction makes a difference.

Explore the future of renting with REIT. Together, let's redefine the way we live, one rental at a time.

Name: RE-PLAY, Location de jouets éco-responsables
Description:
RE-PLAY est une entreprise calédonienne qui propose de la location de jouets écoresponsables pour les enfants de 0 à 6 ans. 

A l'origine de ce projet il y a Solène, fondatrice de RE-PLAY et jeune maman qui cherchait une solution pour proposer des jouets adaptés au développement (trop? ) rapide de son fils mais sans pour autant renoncer aux notions de qualité, de choix, de coût et aux considérations pédagogiques et écologiques qui lui tiennent particulièrement à coeur.

RE-PLAY répond à tous ces critères en proposant plus de 500 références de jouets en bois, carton, matière biosourcée via un catalogue en ligne et la souscription d'un abonnement mensuel.

Les parents ont ainsi la possibilité de choisir chaque mois des jouets pour leur(s) enfant(s) sans courir dans les magasins, sans se ruiner et sans encombrer leur foyer !

Tout se passe en 4 étapes : 
 Sélection des jouets en ligne
 Récupération de la commande en point relais
 Un max d'heures de jeu en famille pendant un mois
 Echange des jeux pour de nouveaux en points relais


RE-PLAY c'est LA solution pédagogique, économique et écologique pour les familles calédoniennes.

Name: ELEI Rent a Car
Description:
Elei este o firmă specializată în servicii de închirieri auto, oferind soluții flexibile și convenabile pentru nevoile de mobilitate ale clienților noștri. Ne dedicăm să asigurăm o experiență sigură și confortabilă în industria închirierilor auto, punând accent pe calitatea serviciilor și satisfacția deplină a clienților.
Cu o gamă variată de vehicule moderne și bine întreținute, Elei vă pune la dispoziție opțiuni personalizate de închiriere, indiferent dacă aveți nevoie de o mașină compactă și economică pentru deplasările urbane sau de un SUV spațios pentru aventurile în natură. Colaborăm exclusiv cu producători și furnizori de încredere, astfel încât să vă putem oferi vehicule de înaltă calitate, sigure și confortabile.
La Elei, ne concentrăm nu doar pe aspectul tehnic al închirierilor auto, ci și pe relația cu clienții noștri. Echipa noastră profesionistă și amabilă este mereu pregătită să vă ofere asistență și sfaturi în selectarea vehiculului potrivit pentru nevoile dvs. Cu politici transparente și prețuri competitive, ne străduim să vă oferim o experiență fără stres și să vă transformăm în clienți fideli.
Indiferent dacă sunteți un turist în căutare de explorare sau un călător de afaceri, Elei vă oferă soluții de închirieri auto convenabile și eficiente. Suntem dedicați să vă oferim flexibilitate și comoditate, astfel încât să vă puteți bucura de călătorii libere și încrezătoare oriunde vă duce drumul.
Alegeți Elei pentru servicii de închirieri auto de încredere și pentru experiențe excepționale de mobilitate. Suntem aici pentru a vă însoți în fiecare călătorie!

Name: Scanderra Healthcare s.r.o.
Description:
Scanderra Healthcare s.r.o.
Švýcarští experti na dentální péči – Prémiové dentální produkty

O nás Scanderra Healthcare s.r.o. je česká pobočka společnosti Scanderra LLB AG, švýcarské firmy specializované na vývoj, výrobu a marketing prémiových dentálních produktů. Z našeho pražského sídla řídíme mezinárodní logistiku a exportní operace celé skupiny Scanderra, čímž zajišťujeme spolehlivé dodavatelské řetězce a kvalitní služby klientům po celém světě.

Naše vize Věříme, že prémiová ústní péče má být dostupná napříč kulturami a kontinenty. Řídíme se švýcarskými standardy kvality a naším cílem je přinášet inovativní, vědecky podložené a uživatelsky přívětivé dentální produkty, které podporují zdravější úsměvy a posilují důvěru v naši značku po celém světě.

Naše činnost

Globální logistické centrum: Koordinace mezinárodních zásilek a exportní dokumentace pro Evropu, Asii a Ameriku.

Prémiové značky: Řízení celosvětové distribuce naší vlajkové značky edelwhite a dodávky třetích dentálních značek v Evropě.

Servis orientovaný na klienta: Centrální kontaktní místo pro mezinárodní distributory, přepravní partnery a klíčové zákazníky.

Švýcarská preciznost, lokální odbornost: Spojujeme švýcarskou kvalitu s pražskou strategickou polohou pro efektivitu, soulad s předpisy a spokojenost zákazníků.

Kultura a hodnoty Jsme podnikaví, spolehliví a zaměření na lidi. Náš tým vyniká jasnou komunikací, multikulturní spoluprací a neustálou optimalizací procesů. Usilujeme o budování dlouhodobých partnerství prostřednictvím excelence v kvalitě produktů i služeb.

Sídlo: Praha 1, Česká republika Mateřská společnost: Scanderra LLB AG, Basilej, Švýcarsko Web: www.scanderra.com

Name: Bedst til Fest
Description:
Om os
Bedst til fest lægger vægt på, at vores kunder får den bedste oplevelse i selskab med os. Dette er grundlaget for vores eksistens og størrelse i dag. Vi lægger vægt på at rådgivning, knowhow, udvalg og alle processer lever op til de standarder, som man kan forvente sig af en moderne virksomhed.

Lej alt et sted: Når du vælger Bedst til fest som samarbejdspartner, behøver du ikke at holde rede på et hav af forskellige leverandører. Vort store udvalg kombineret med mange års erfaring, sørger for at du kan føle dig 100 % tryg, når dit arrangement skal løbe af stablen.Vi tilbyder alt fra teltudlejning, udlejning af borde, udlejning af stole til isterninger.

Kundeservice: Vi har fuldtids-bemanding på vort kontor med dygtige konsulenter, der kan kontaktes på mail eller telefon. Vi har egen kørselsafdeling, så vi altid er parat til at hjælpe dig.

Kapacitet: Fra 2 til 1000, vi har fidusen. Ingen opgaver er for store og ingen er for små. Gennem de sidste 20 år har mere end 700.000 mennesker stiftet bekendtskab med vores koncept.

Målsætning: Vi har som dedikeret mål at hjælpe vores kunder med at omsætte fantasi til virkelighed, når du som privat eller virksomhed skal afholde fester eller events.

Succeskriterium: Høj kundetilfredshed

Name: Dürdoth Autovermietung GmbH
Description:
Als Dürdoth Autovermietung GmbH sind wir seit über 60 Jahren ein zuverlässiger Partner in der Vermietung von Fahrzeugen.1962 gründete Manfred Dürdoth die Autovermietung „Dürdoth am Viehhof” im Stadtteil Arrenberg an der Viehhofstraße 154 in Wuppertal Elberfeld. Schnell etablierte er sich zur bekanntesten Autovermietung im Tal. Im Jahr 2001 übernahm Ralph Hanisch das Unternehmen und die Geschäftsführung. Der Firmensitz ist seit Gründung unverändert am selben Standort in Wuppertal am Arrenberg.Unser Angebot reicht vom Kleinstwagen der PKW Klasse bis zum LKW 3,5 to mit Ladebordwand. Ebenfalls können wir Ihnen Busse mit bis zu 9 Sitzen anbieten.
Wir arbeiten auch mit verschiedenen Werkstätten zusammen um Sie als Kunden mobil zu halten. Ob als Werkstattersatzfahrzeug oder als Unfallersatzfahrzeug mit der Abrechnung über die Versicherung.
Seit 2023 dürfen wir auch die Personenbeförderung anbieten. Wir beschränken uns hier auf die Beförderung von Menschen mit Behinderungen.
Es wurden entsprechende Fahrzeuge erworben, mit einer Rollstuhlgerechten Ausstattung. Es ist möglich die Fahrzeuge selbst anzumieten oder uns mit der Personenbeförderung zu beauftragen. 

Persönlich vor Ort zu sein, statt alles nur über eine App buchbar zu machen, ist uns wichtig! Das ist es was uns auszeichnet! Flexiblie Planung innerhalb und ausserhalb der Geschäftszeiten. Problemlösungen und schnelle Organisation um unsere Kunden mobil zu halten. Durch eine großes Netzwerk können wir über die Grenzen von NRW hinaus agieren.

Name: Wheelchair Getaways
Description:
Wheelchair Getaways started as Accessible Vans of America in February of 1997. Today we remain a member-owned organization made up of independent mobility dealers and local accessible transportation providers. Our purpose is to consistently provide you with the highest standards of product quality, safety, and customer service to meet your wheelchair-accessible vehicle needs. Our nationwide network of over 190 locations is a testament to the decades of happy customers who have used Wheelchair Getaways for their accessible vehicle rentals.
The philosophy of the organization is to recruit top Mobility Dealers. AVA is the only organization in this industry to require that all members be an existing mobility dealer as well as a member of the National Mobility Equipment Dealers Association. This qualification ensures that all of our locations have the knowledge, training and understanding of the specialized needs and abilities that exist for our customers.

AVA's national toll free phone number, 866-224-1750, was established to provide convenience for our customers and efficiency for the Member Dealers. When a customer calls our toll free number, the call is routed to the dealer closest to the caller's location.

Description:
Founded in 1947, SIAMP knew from the beginning how to innovate in the sanitary market. From the early days it was obvious that it was at stake in the use of water, so SIAMP concentrated on developing technical solutions which respect this vital resource.

Now a major player in the sanitary equipment market, SIAMP is continually striving to improve the viability, the efficiency and the design of its products. Toilet seats, cisterns, flush valves, float valves, drainage, mounting frames, solutions for less able bodied people, for cladding, for maintenance or ventilation: SIAMP designs, manufactures and distributes a large range of products and systems for toilet equipment.

Worldwide partner of the major ceramic manufacturers and with hundreds of distributors, SIAMP is in constant touch with this ever-evolving market. Detecting consumers new requirements, concerned by sustainable development, SIAMP is therefore the source of innovations, recognized by a large number of international patents.

With its Monaco factory supporting the UK network, SIAMP is also present in several locations in Europe and Asia with its subsidiaries in Turkey, Vietnam, India and China.

Name: Transgo Group
Description:
TransGo Group was founded in 2022 as a technology-driven holding company overseeing PT Marifah Cipta Bangsa, PT TransGo Mobility Rental, and PT Toprent Santuy Abadi. The group builds on the digital commerce expertise of PT Marifah Cipta Bangsa, which began in 2021 as an online shop selling fashion and lifestyle products through Shopee, Tokopedia, and TikTok Shop. This early success laid the foundation for scalable retail operations and provided the momentum to evolve into a rental and service ecosystem.

Today, TransGo Group specializes in car rental, motorcycle rental, iPhone rental in Jakarta, Starlink rental and installation, online driver fleet services, electric motorcycle rental for ride-hailing drivers, outdoor and camping equipment rental, as well as workshop and inspection services. With a fleet of over 300+ cars and motorcycles, the company operates across Jakarta, Bogor, Depok, Tangerang, Bekasi, Bandung, Yogyakarta, Surabaya, and Bali, catering to both individuals and corporate clients.

The group’s competitive edge lies in its 1-minute digital booking system, 24/7 AI-powered WhatsApp chatbot, and a marketing network of 100+ social media accounts with more than 300,000 followers. This integration of technology and customer focus positions TransGo as a pioneer in Indonesia’s modern rental economy.

TransGo Group also builds growth through strategic partnerships:

 Maka Motors, with an MoU to manage 200 electric motorcycles in 2025, supporting the transition to sustainable mobility.

 Gojek, supplying up to 500 rental vehicles by the end of 2025 under its Fleet Partner Program.

Beyond business, TransGo is committed to youth empowerment by collaborating with vocational schools and universities, promoting digital literacy, entrepreneurship, and sustainable business practices.

With a vision to become Indonesia’s leading rental and lifestyle ecosystem, TransGo Group continues to expand its impact through innovation, accessibility, and sustainability.

Vous souhaitez aménager vous-même un véhicule, nous vendons et installons dans nos ateliers, les toits relevables SCA. Avec cet équipement, vous tenez debout dans votre van ou votre fourgon et vous bénéficiez d'un couchage pour deux personnes.

Et enfin, quoi de plus naturel pour nous que de vous proposer, en partenariat avec l'office du tourisme de l'Yonne, un circuit touristique afin de découvrir notre belle région !

La società ha sede centrale a Bologna, quattro show room a  Modena, Venezia, Firenze e Vicenza e rappresentanti commerciali per il noleggio catering a Milano, noleggio catering a Genova, noleggio catering a Verona, noleggio catering a Tornio, noleggio catering a Parma, noleggio catering a Reggio Emilia, noleggio catering a Piacenza, noleggio catering a Brescia e noleggio catering a Rimini e Riccione.

Bologna è il centro organizzativo della società in quanto sede della direzione, degli uffici commerciali ed amministrativi, del magazzino e logistica. Attualmente vi operano 13 impiegate e  35 addetti tra operai specializzati e autisti.

I quattro show room di Modena, Venezia, Firenze e Vicenza sono nati dall'esigenza sempre più forte di essere più vicini in maniera concreta e tangibile ai clienti di queste zone che nel corso negli anni hanno deciso di avvalersi dei servizi di NoloParty con soddisfazione ed entusiasmo.

Per questo motivo si è deciso di creare un punto di riferimento importante con una sala mostra sempre aggiornata con le ultime novità affidata ad una consulente del posto che mette a disposizione non soltanto la propria professionalità ma anche la conoscenza del territorio in cui opera.

Il nostro obiettivo comune è quello di proporre un  Servizio a 360° - 24/24h - 7/7g dato non soltanto dalla  qualità di tutti gli articoli proposti a noleggio ma anche e soprattutto dalla professionalità e assistenza attenta e scrupolosa fornita da tutti i nostri collaboratori in ogni fase della trattativa e dell'ordine.

Name: Moowerent Car Rental
Description:
Moowerent: Il tuo partner di fiducia per il noleggio auto in Italia
Moowerent è il nuovo punto di riferimento per il noleggio auto in Italia. Con una rete in continua espansione, Moowerent offre soluzioni di mobilità flessibili, affidabili e su misura per ogni esigenza. Dalla città alle isole, copriamo le principali destinazioni italiane con un servizio che si distingue per qualità, convenienza e attenzione al cliente.

Nel 2024 abbiamo inaugurato 10 filiali con una flotta di 800 veicoli, e il nostro obiettivo è continuare a crescere: entro il 2025 apriremo altre 8 location, comprese le isole, con una flotta che supererà le 1600 vetture. Che tu stia pianificando un viaggio di lavoro, una vacanza o semplicemente una breve fuga, Moowerent ti offre l’auto perfetta per ogni occasione, con un servizio attento ai dettagli e un’assistenza personalizzata.

Cosa ci distingue?

- Una flotta moderna e diversificata per soddisfare ogni necessità.
- Uffici nelle principali città e aeroporti italiani.
- Tariffe trasparenti e competitive.
- Un servizio clienti disponibile e attento.
- Opzioni di noleggio a breve, medio e lungo termine.

Il nostro impegno è verso un futuro della mobilità più sostenibile e accessibile. Stiamo lavorando per ampliare la nostra offerta di veicoli elettrici e soluzioni ecologiche, così da permettere a tutti di viaggiare in modo responsabile e nel pieno rispetto dell'ambiente.

Scegli Moowerent per il tuo prossimo viaggio e scopri un nuovo modo di vivere la mobilità in Italia.

Name: Personal Renter
Description:
Aiutiamo Privati, Liberi Professionisti e Aziende a risolvere i loro Problemi di Mobilità, attraverso l'intelligente formula, del Noleggio a Breve e Lungo Termine. Verificando se questa risulta essere la scelta più idonea, in funzione di ogni specifica esigenza e stile di guida!
Siamo una nuova figura Professionale, che guida i Clienti nella giusta "scelta" tra Servizi e Auto desiderata, con costi certi, nella massima chiarezza e trasparenza. Ottimizzando i costi per la tua famiglia o attività, senza perdite di tempo, librandoti di incombenze burocratiche, permettendoti di utilizzare al meglio il tuo Tempo e quello dei tuoi collaboratori, la cosa appunto più preziosa che possediamo, con la certezza dei costi e senza pensieri!
Personal Renter opera da più di 4 anni nel settore del noleggio a lungo e breve termine, per auto e veicoli commerciali, su tutto il territorio Nazionale. Abbiamo puntato sul noleggio come alternativa valida all’acquisto, siamo specializzati nel formulare la migliore esperienza di guida per i vari clienti Privati o Aziende che siano, verificando se questa Soluzione, possa fare al caso tuo!
Obiettivo principale, la soddisfazione del cliente, facendo attenzione alle nuove tecnologie ed alle variabili che il mercato fornisce. Siamo professionisti del settore formati e specializzati, in grado di guidare il cliente finale nella scelta più idonea, tra le diverse auto (soprattutto le diverse alimentazioni) e di guidarlo in tutta serenità per la parte burocratica, occupandoci noi di tutto.

Name: 4x4 Vehicle Hire UK Ltd
Description:
4x4 Vehicle Hire are a Franchise based car rental company. The company launched it’s first franchise in Yorkshire in 2013 and today the company operates in dozens of different locations around the
UK and Ireland and has a substantial fleet of new and older 4x4’s still with an emphasis on Land Rover models, but also with other
marques available.

In 2017 the Master Franchise License was acquired by the
company’s Essex franchisees, 4x4 Vehicle Hire UK was born and a new chapter in the company’s history began. With a focus on what works for it’s franchisees, an injection of capital and ambitious plans to take the business to the next level there has never been a better time to join the company and launch your own local 4x4 hire franchise.

The franchise model has recently been awarded “recommended status” by www.franchiselife.co.uk.

UK WIDE 4X4 RENTAL

Our range of 4×4 rental cars means that we can provide a vehicle for every 4WD requirement from practical SUV rental cars to get you through the snow to high end luxury city cars like the Evoque.

Through our network of local franchises we can deliver your 4×4 hire car anywhere in mainland UK. We are also able to arrange delivery and collection for UK airports 4×4 hire. Birmingham, East Midlands, Gatwick, Heathrow, Stansted & Luton, Newcastle, Liverpool, Edinburgh, Belfast and Manchester airports are all within easy reach of our 4×4 hire locations.

WEDDING CAR HIRE
Call 4×4 Vehicle Hire when you want a prestige wedding car hire. Hire an SUV or RV for your honeymoon trip or when you are having a celebration, are off on holiday or just visiting the UK. Whether you need it for simply getting to your church service and reception or want to take it off on your honeymoon, a luxury 4×4 will ensure that the days are even more special. The roominess and comfort will keep the bride (and bride’s dress) beautiful, and keep her comfortable on her big day!  And the groom won’t mind travelling in a luxury car, either!

Name: GreenPan
Description:
GreenPan is an award-winning, sustainably built line of healthy nonstick ceramic cookware perfect for every kitchen - with colorful pieces and collections that will catch your eye. 

Founded by Jan Helskens and Wim De Veirman, our focus is on the environment. We're committed to sustainable practices, becoming an innovator in cookware, with over 150 patents for technological advancements. 

We introduced Thermolon to culinary spaces and kitchens across the world in 2007. Thermolon is the first alternative to traditional cookware coatings, is plastic-free, and is formulated from sand. GreenPan cookware is free of PFAS, PFOA, cadmium, and lead and made using groundbreaking technology. PFAS, also known as forever chemicals, are synthetic chemicals and what conventional nonstick coatings are made from. Our products are also created using recycled aluminum and upcycled stainless steel.

We develop and manufacture our products in our eco-friendly GreenPan-owned factory using less CO2, in-house water filtration, and solar power. And we own our wastewater treatment plant. The GreenPan factory has been awarded multiple ISO certificates for the care of our staff and surroundings.

Our Valencia Pro cookware collection has been recognized with a Good Housekeeping 2023 Sustainable Innovation Award for the use of certified recycled aluminum. 

Our sustainability efforts don't stop there. We will safely recycle your old cookware.

The Original GreenPan brand is under the umbrella companies owned by The Cookware Company, which has offices around the globe. 

We've revolutionized and redefined cookware. 

Visit https://www.greenpan.us/ to learn more about our cookware, ovenware, electrics, cutlery, utensils, and more.

Name: Rentity Global Services
Description:
Rentity is a marketplace connecting Consumer Products (Durables, Electronics, Appliances, FMCG), health, fitness, and several other Brands directly with customers. We implement the principles of Circular Economy for our customers and partners.

On the one hand, major Corporates are committed to meeting global standards of Circular Economy by reducing waste and growing sustainably. They need to identity new opportunities of revenue creation, gain market share and wallet share with younger generation of buyers with rapidly expanding purchasing power.

On the other hand, the purchasing power (consumer spend) of Gen-Z and Millennials is slated to increase from current $ 600 Billion to $ 3.6 Trillion by the year 2030 in India alone. This generation prefers usership over ownership, is brand-aware, choses flexible (try and buy) models, and consumes responsibly. Over 1.1 Billion consumers will have access to internet by the Year 2030 in India. Over 95% of the connected consumers will have access to Smartphones, looking for opportunities to upgrade their lifestyles.

At the intersection of the above two scenarios is the “need” that Rentity fulfils.
Rentity (www.rentity.in) is fully integrated with payment gateways, real-time background verification services, logistics service providers, and other necessary operations. We have enabled Brands such as WonderChef (www.wondrchef.com) reduce waste, monetise slow-moving inventory, and increase product velocity - while gaining wallet-share with Millennials and Gen-Z customer through online and B2B channels.

Name: NEOYOT
Description:
NEOYOT par U-Boat Investment
La société luxembourgeoise U-Boat Investment fondée en 2016 par Philippe Bacou lance le concept NEOYOT.

A l'instar des néo-banques, NEOYOT répond à la nouvelle tendance de mobilité et de consommation des plaisanciers.

En juin 2022 a été l'ouverture de la première franchise NEOYOT.

Le concept :
NEOYOT L’ABONNEMENT À UN YACHT EN UTILISATION PARTAGÉE
La meilleure alternative à l’acquisition, qui offre une simplicité d’accès à une industrie très difficile à aborder.
 
ON VOUS DIT TOUT
•  Avec NEOYOT, utilisez votre yacht sans les contraintes d’être propriétaire. L'avantage d’un abonnement est que vous ne supportez aucun risque tel que la perte de valeur, les réparations ou les accidents. Vous ne payez qu'un forfait garanti pour votre utilisation annuelle. 
•  Tous les impondérables sont désormais notre préoccupation. Le yacht, son équipage et sa gestion sont sous la responsabilité de NEOYOT.

10 BONNES RAISONS DE VOUS ABONNER :
 
➦ TOUT INCLUS : 
Capitaine, assurance, entretien, place de port, etc …
 
➦ SERVICES SUR-MESURE : 
Votre bateau est prêt à partir toute l'année.
 
➦ BATEAU NEUF : 
Modèle 2023, full option
 
➦ LIVRAISON IMMÉDIATE : 
Pas de délai d’attente.
 
➦ 0 € D’APPORT : 
Vous payez uniquement votre mensualité, sans immobilisation de capital.
 
➦ UN COÛT FIXE : 
Vous ne supportez aucun risque tel que la perte de valeur, les réparations ou les accidents.
 
➦ 5 FOIS MOINS CHER :
Les avantages de la mutualisation sont bien connus pour réduire les coûts.
 
➦ FLEXIBLE : 
Changez de bateau facilement tous les ans.
 
➦ PARTAGE ÉQUITABLE : 
Algorithme Intelligent accessible 24h/24 en illimité via l’application NEOYOT.
 
➦ A PORTÉ DE MAIN : 
Procédure de réservation en moins de 30 secondes depuis votre smartphone.

Name: Scenic Sofreh
Description:
At Scenic Sofreh, we specialize in luxury Sofreh Aghd rentals for Persian weddings, elegant wedding decor for all backgrounds, and custom event styling for a wide range of celebrations. Based in Vancouver, we proudly bring beautifully curated designs directly to your venue — offering full setup and takedown services that make your event seamless and unforgettable.

We are best known for our stunning Sofreh Aghd displays, designed to honour Persian traditions while adding a refined and contemporary aesthetic. Each setup is carefully styled with symbolic elements, premium materials, and personalized touches to reflect the unique story of every couple.

In addition to Sofreh Aghd, we offer full-service wedding decor for all couples — from romantic outdoor ceremonies and chic micro-weddings to lavish ballroom receptions. Our decor services include arches, backdrops, florals, centerpieces, welcome signs, and more — all tailored to create a cohesive, high-end look that reflects your vision.

Scenic Sofreh also provides custom decor and rentals for events of every kind, including engagements, bridal showers, baby showers, birthdays, anniversaries, corporate events, and cultural celebrations. Whether you need a few signature pieces or a full event transformation, we bring creativity, attention to detail, and professionalism to every project.

With a focus on elevated design, cultural appreciation, and exceptional service, Scenic Sofreh transforms ordinary spaces into unforgettable experiences. We make it easy for you to celebrate beautifully — with decor that is as meaningful as it is breathtaking.

Noi siamo davvero gli esperti del noleggio e non abbiamo timore di metterci la faccia! 

L’esperienza e l'affidabilità del gruppo TM Wagen, inoltre, sono la miglior garanzia post vendita per ogni scelta dei nostri clienti. 

Trovare la soluzione giusta per la vostra mobilità è la nostra missione! Non siamo i "soliti" broker che inseguono solo un ordine!

Name: Dijelac
Description:
Dijelac is Croatia's first online platform that facilitates the rental and sharing of various items. Our mission is to promote sustainable living and help users save money through the shared use of resources. Whether you need tools, sports equipment, or household appliances, Dijelac connects you with a community of people willing to share their items, providing an easy, secure, and economical way to access what you need.

At Dijelac, we believe in the power of community and the benefits of a sustainable lifestyle. Join us in creating a more connected and eco-friendly future by sharing and renting items effortlessly.

Dijelac offers individuals the opportunity to generate additional income by renting out their items. Businesses engaged in the sharing economy can also benefit by using Dijelac to share their inventory, saving the effort of creating their own platform while earning revenue.

Our platform leverages cutting-edge technologies such as NextJS, Flutter, and Django to ensure a seamless and intuitive user experience across both web and mobile devices. We prioritize safety and trust, featuring detailed user profiles, a robust rating and review system, and comprehensive security measures.

Name: RentAbout
Description:
At RentAbout, we're pioneering a new era in asset sharing with our innovative peer-to-peer mobile application, targeting underutilization and environmental impact. Our platform facilitates the sharing of diverse assets, ranging from Home and Garden Equipment to Electronics and Photography Equipment, empowering asset owners to generate passive income in a secure environment. This initiative not only offers renters a sustainable and cost-effective alternative but also aligns with the expanding circular and sharing economies in the UK. Our commitment to sustainability and efficiency mirrors the increasing environmental awareness and the growing appeal of cost savings and convenience in today's market.

'RentAbout' symbolizes a continuous cycle of shared assets, deeply integrated with the principles of the circular economy. By capitalizing on technological advancements, we offer a dynamic marketplace that reshapes consumption patterns towards sustainability. With 62% of the UK population already participating in the sharing economy, RentAbout is not just a rental platform, but a catalyst for a communal, eco-friendly, and cost-efficient lifestyle. Our mission goes beyond meeting market demands; it's about fostering a responsible, connected, and environmentally conscious community.

Become a part of RentAbout today – where every rental is a step towards a more sustainable future. Share, save, and sustain with us. 

Let's revolutionize consumption together!

Name: Rentee
Description:
Peer-to-peer renting platform. Rent anything from anyone, anytime, anywhere.

Got a bunch of speakers you don’t use often or a suit you don’t wear? You drive your drone a couple of times a year and would like to make money on it the rest of the year? 

Have you dreamed of becoming a photographer for a weekend? Or have you just wanted to have an iPhone 13 for one day to impress a girl on your first date?   

Use that time to rent your stuff to anyone, anytime and along the way earn or rent stuff from other people!

Rent anything at the tap of a button!
Rentee app is the easiest way to rent what you need and manage your rentals and purchases.
Also, become a Renter and start earning passive income.

Rent in a few simple steps:
Find the things you need and send a request to Renter for a certain period of time. Your reservation is only confirmed when the owner accepts the request. After confirming the request, arrange a suitable time to pick up the item and ask any questions you have.

List an item:
Take a photo, add a description, the price and deposit, and publish the listing. Respond immediately to requests and messages and start making money.

Name: Flexigoods
Description:
Flexigoods – Affordable Rent-to-Own Solutions for Appliances, Electronics & Furniture in New Zealand

Flexigoods is a trusted rent-to-own company in New Zealand, providing a budget-friendly and convenient way to own essential household products. Our goal is to help Kiwis furnish their homes affordably and stress-free.

Why Choose Flexigoods?

Flexible Payment Plans – Spread out the cost with manageable weekly payments that fit your budget.

Wide Selection of Products – Choose from top-brand appliances, electronics, and furniture to suit your home and lifestyle.

Quick & Easy Approval – Our hassle-free application process ensures you get approved quickly with minimal paperwork.

Ownership at the End of Term – Unlike standard rentals, our rent-to-own model lets you fully own the product once all payments are completed.

Fast & Reliable Delivery – We offer quick delivery services across Auckland and beyond, so you receive your items without long waits.

No Hidden Fees – Enjoy transparent pricing with no surprise charges.

Our Product Categories:

Home Appliances – Washing machines, refrigerators, microwaves, and more.

Electronics – Smart TVs, gaming consoles, laptops, and mobile phones.

Furniture – Sofas, beds, dining tables, wardrobes, and office essentials.

How It Works:

Choose Your Product – Browse our wide selection of rent-to-own items.

Apply Online or In-Store – Quick and easy application process.

Fast Delivery – Get your items delivered promptly.

Pay Weekly Installments – Enjoy flexible, affordable payments.

Own It at the End – The product is yours once all payments are complete.

Who Can Apply?

Anyone in New Zealand looking for an affordable way to furnish their home can apply.

Name: Travoltic GmbH
Description:
Travoltic steht für smarte, nachhaltige und alltagstaugliche Energielösungen.
Unser Ziel ist es, mobile Energie überall dort bereitzustellen, wo Menschen unterwegs sind – schnell, einfach und zuverlässig.

Gegründet im Jahr 2025 in Bayern, entstand Travoltic aus der Idee, moderne Technologie mit echtem Alltagsnutzen zu verbinden. Wir möchten Menschen die Freiheit geben, ihre Geräte jederzeit laden zu können. Und das ohne eigenes Kabel, ohne eigene Powerbank, ohne Umstände.

Unsere Powerbank-Stationen sind an zentralen hoch frequentierten Orten des täglichen Lebens zu finden. Damit bieten wir eine praktische Lösung für alle, die viel unterwegs sind und Wert auf Flexibilität und Komfort legen.

Über unsere Travoltic App lässt sich die nächstgelegene Station im Handumdrehen finden. Eine Powerbank kann in wenigen Sekunden ausgeliehen und nach Gebrauch ebenso einfach wieder zurückgegeben werden. Der gesamte Prozess ist intuitiv, effizient und auf maximale Benutzerfreundlichkeit ausgelegt. Energie zum Mitnehmen, genau dann, wenn sie gebraucht wird.

Travoltic steht für Innovation mit Verantwortung. Unsere Produkte werden so konzipiert, dass sie langlebig, energieeffizient und ressourcenschonend sind, da auch für uns Nachhaltigkeit kein Trend, sondern ein zentraler Bestandteil unserer Identität ist.

Unsere Mission:
Wir möchten eine Welt schaffen, in der Energie jederzeit zugänglich ist – ohne Grenzen, ohne Kompromisse.

Unsere Vision:
Travoltic steht für eine neue Generation mobiler Energieversorgung – smart, nachhaltig und vernetzt. Wir glauben an Technologie, die das Leben einfacher macht und Menschen miteinander verbindet.

Unsere Werte:
Nachhaltigkeit. Innovation. Einfachheit. Verlässlichkeit.

Name: Eco-Bug Global
Description:
Eco Bug – Redefining Everyday Sustainability
Eco Bug is an emerging sustainable brand committed to transforming day-to-day essentials into eco-friendly alternatives. Our mission is simple yet impactful: to replace conventional, wasteful products with sustainable, reusable, and biodegradable options that drive meaningful change over the next five years.

 Our Product Line
We specialize in eco-conscious, practical products that consumers use regularly, making sustainability an effortless lifestyle choice. Our current and upcoming product range includes:

Bamboo Toothbrushes: Biodegradable and plastic-free oral care solutions.

Cotton Swabs: Made from bamboo and organic cotton, offering a sustainable alternative to plastic swabs.

Combs and Hair Brushes: Crafted from bamboo and other eco-friendly materials, promoting waste-free grooming.

Reusable Bottles: Durable, BPA-free bottles designed to reduce single-use plastic waste.

Cutlery and Tableware: Eco-friendly, reusable, and compostable cutlery made from bamboo, wood, or wheat straw.

Other Daily Essentials: We continuously expand our range with simple yet high-impact products that promote sustainable living.

 Our Vision
At Eco Bug, we believe that small, consistent lifestyle changes can create a massive market shift. By offering affordable, accessible, and high-quality sustainable products, we aim to:

Reduce plastic waste: By replacing single-use plastic products with reusable or biodegradable alternatives.

Promote conscious consumption: Encouraging consumers to make eco-friendly choices in their daily lives.

Drive market transformation: Establishing Eco Bug as a leading name in sustainable consumer goods over the next five years.

 Our Commitment
We are dedicated to ethical sourcing, environmentally friendly packaging, and transparent business practices. Our products are designed to be durable, functional, and sustainable, ensuring they meet consumer needs while reducing environmental impact.

Name: RentalSì Noleggio Auto
Description:
RentalSì è una società di noleggio auto a lungo termine partecipata dalla Holding H2B che offre a grandi, piccole e medie imprese, nonché a professionisti e privati, la possibilità di noleggiare auto e veicoli commerciali a lungo termine, alle migliori condizioni sul mercato, garantite da accordi quadro sottoscritti con i principali originators europei.

MISSION
La mission di RentalSì è offrire al cliente soluzioni di mobilità innovative, flessibili e all’avanguardia. L’obiettivo è di aiutare la clientela ad individuare la giusta soluzione alle sue esigenze, un risultato che RentalSì mira ad ottenere attraverso servizi di consulenza mirati e professionali ma, soprattutto, tramite partnership con primarie realtà del settore.

VISION
La vision di RentalSì è diventare un punto di riferimento per aziende di ogni dimensione, professionisti e privati nel settore del noleggio auto, moto e veicoli commerciali a lungo termine. Per raggiungere questo traguardo RentalSì creerà una rete di agency a marchio esclusivo presenti su tutto il territorio nazionale e attraverso l’apertura di nuovi Point. In una società in costante evoluzione, RentalSì mira a cogliere le tendenze e le opportunità del mercato per offrire servizi dalla qualità riconosciuta su tutto il territorio nazionale e soddisfare le aspettative di un pubblico con esigenze dinamiche e rinnovate.

I Nostri Valori
I nostri valori costituiscono le linee guida fondamentali dell’attività aziendale. Su tali valori condivisi si vanno ad innestare le competenze trasversali che determinano il comportamento delle persone; non solo la qualità del servizio che offriamo al cliente, ma la qualità stessa del nostro vivere il posto di lavoro, dipende in larga parte dalla condivisione e dall’applicazione di quei valori. I dipendenti, collaboratori di RentalSì devono condividere l’applicazione dei seguenti valori, elementi fondamentali per appartenere al nostro Gruppo.

Name: KANAP
Description:
Pourquoi KANAP?
Trouver un appartement étudiant est déjà un défi… mais l’aménager en est un autre. Acheter des meubles coûte cher, demande beaucoup de temps et peut vite devenir un casse-tête au moment du départ. 

Résultat ? 
Beaucoup d’étudiants se retrouvent à revendre ou à jeter dans l’urgence les meubles encore fonctionnels qu'ils ont achetés quelques mois plus tôt.

Avec KANAP, on a voulu créé le service qu'on aurai rêvé d'avoir eu à portée de main pendant nos années d'études. Une solution simple, économique et responsable : la location de meubles adaptée aux besoins des étudiants.

 Notre mission :
 Faciliter la vie des étudiants en leur évitant l’achat, le transport et la revente de leurs meubles.
 Réduire les coûts avec un paiement mensuel au lieu d’un gros investissement dès l’emménagement.
 Soutenir un modèle de consommation plus durable en réutilisant des meubles de seconde main plutôt que d'en acheter de nouveaux.
 Faciliter la recherche de logement en permettant aux étudiants Erasmus, sans permis et sans gros budget d'opter pour un bien non-meublé.

 Nos valeurs :
-  Écologique, donner une seconde vie aux meubles pour limiter le gaspillage et l’impact environnemental.
-  Économique, permettre aux étudiants de vivre confortablement tout en économisant de l'argent.
-  Flexible, s’adapter aux besoins des étudiants avec un service une durée modifiable après la souscription et sans engagement long terme.

 Comment ça marche ?
1 Sélectionnez sur notre site les meubles dont vous avez besoin.
2 Décidez de votre durée de location (de 3 à 24 mois).
3 Choisissez la date de livraison et de récupération des meubles.
4 Une caution sera demandée à la livraison et restituée à la reprise.

 KANAP, c’est donc bien plus qu'un simple plateforme de location.
C'est une réponse concrète aux défis de celles et ceux qui veulent un logement confortable et ça, sans avoir à se déplacer, ni à se ruiner !

Description:
ROMET Business Link to jedyna tego typu usługa dla firm dbających o zdrowie, aktywność i dobre samopoczucie swoich pracowników, która proponuje im dostęp do rowerów elektrycznych i tradycyjnych.

To oferta wprost od polskiego producenta, w ramach której dostępne są nowoczesne rowery na atrakcyjnych i dopasowanych do wymagań warunkach:

- najem długoterminowy, nawet do 24 miesięcy
- zakup rowerów na preferencyjnych zasadach z wykorzystaniem rabatów dilerskich
- leasing rowerów na atrakcyjnych warunkach

Rozwiązanie kierowane jest do firm, które chciałyby na bardzo korzystnych warunkach wynająć lub kupić nowoczesne rowery elektryczne bądź tradycyjne i zaoferować je:

- pracownikom w formie benefitu pracowniczego
- klientom jako dodatkowa, atrakcyjna usługa. 

Rower elektryczny może z powodzeniem zastąpić samochód służbowy zwłaszcza w codziennych dojazdach w obrębie miasta. Rower likwiduje problem korków oraz braku miejsc parkingowych, a pracownicy prowadzący aktywny tryb życia są zadowoleni, zmotywowani i mają więcej energii do wykonywania codziennych zadań.

Flota rowerów, w tym rowerów elektrycznych, to także doskonałe uzupełnienie oferty najlepszych hoteli, którym zależy na wzbogaceniu niezapomnianych doświadczeń odwiedzających ich gości. Turyści zyskują doskonały sposób na eksplorowanie bliższych i dalszych okolic odwiedzanego hotelu. 

W ofercie ROMET Business Link znajdują się najlepsze rowery ROMET z przełomowej kolekcji 2024 lub wybrane modele z lat poprzednich. To gwarancja jakości i niezawodności oraz pełna opieka ze strony producenta, gdyż rowery są serwisowane zgodnie z wszystkimi wymogami. Zapraszamy do kontaktu i współpracy.

Name: Hive5
Description:
The first thought you get when you need a product is that you have to buy it. We strive to change that mentality by offering a solution that will either make you money or save your money. Simply put, rent instead of buy. We would like to provide people with alternative ways to make additional income and put their things to use, and also give people flexibility, ease and cost savings by finding things they need occasionally close to their homes, rather than buying for hefty prices. We want to promote this culture of reuse and give and take, hence we came up with the name Hive5 which resembles people interacting together and helping each other!

Name: C'est Pour Bientôt - CPB
Description:
C'est Pour Bientôt est une plateforme collaborative dédiée à la location et à la vente entre particuliers d'équipements de puériculture. Pensée pour aider les parents à accéder facilement à des produits de qualité, elle offre deux solutions complémentaires : louer pour répondre à des besoins temporaires ou acheter d’occasion pour une utilisation durable. 

Notre modèle favorise une approche responsable de la consommation, réduisant les déchets et permettant aux familles d’économiser tout en accédant à des articles fiables.
En intégrant la vente entre particuliers, nous élargissons notre engagement en créant un véritable écosystème où les produits trouvent une seconde vie. Cette démarche s’inscrit pleinement dans une logique d’économie circulaire, contribuant à diminuer l'empreinte écologique liée à la parentalité. 

C'est Pour Bientôt a un double impact, à la fois social et environnemental.
Impact environnemental : En favorisant la réutilisation des équipements, que ce soit via la location ou la vente, nous participons activement à l’économie circulaire. Chaque produit trouve une seconde vie, réduisant les besoins de production, la surconsommation, et les déchets. Cette nouvelle fonctionnalité permet aux parents d’allier flexibilité et durabilité.

Impact social : En associant location et vente, nous offrons des solutions économiques accessibles à tous. Les familles, notamment celles en milieu modeste ou urbain, accèdent à des équipements de qualité sans se ruiner, tout en rejoignant une communauté solidaire où le partage est central.

Notre ambition ? Transformer la parentalité en encourageant des habitudes de consommation responsables, collaboratives, et durables.

Description:
The Scarlett Box is a purpose-driven UK company committed to championing menstrual dignity and comfort for women in maritime. Born from lived experience and a deep understanding of the unique challenges faced by women in maritime. The Scarlett Box is on a mission to transform menstrual health support in the maritime industry.

At its heart, it’s a simple red emergency period-product box designed for workplaces, where access to period care is limited. The idea is small, but the impact is significant: improving dignity, wellbeing, and inclusion for women working in environments that have historically overlooked their needs.

The Scarlett Box ensures that essential support is available where and when it’s needed most—helping organisations create more inclusive, supportive, and safety-focused working environments.

Founded by Scarlett Barnett-Smith, a seasoned Deck Officer with nearly a decade of maritime experience, The Scarlett Box combines professional insight with genuine empathy to address a real and often overlooked need in the industry. The company reflects a commitment to wellbeing, equality, and practical innovation - driving meaningful change by placing empowerment and dignity at the centre of its mission.

Name: Rent and Go
Description:
Il gruppo Rent and Go:

-> 80+ noleggi sci e bici in Italia
-> 400.000+ clienti soddisfatti all'anno
-> 35.000 sci e snowboard
-> 5.000 bici ed e-bike
-> 20.000 caschi e protezioni
-> 2.000 slittini
-> 3.000 sci di fondo

Nel 1996, Erwin Stricker, Kurt Ladstätter e Gerhard Königsrainer – tre protagonisti dello sci mondiale legati da una profonda amicizia, dalla grande passione per la montagna e dalla comune origine südtirolese – diedero vita ad una realtà che avrebbe impresso un cambio epocale nel mondo del noleggio dell’attrezzatura sportiva invernale.

Da pratica considerata sinonimo di materiali scadenti per sciatori inesperti e occasionali, i "tre moschettieri dello sci" trasformarono il concetto di noleggio in un servizio di altissimo livello adatto a tutti gli sciatori – dai principianti ai più appassionati e capaci – investendo principalmente su qualità e sicurezza, dove anticiparono di dieci anni abitudini e leggi che oggi ci appaiono scontate.

Oggi Rent and Go è il primo Gruppo di noleggi sci e bici di qualità in Italia, con oltre 80 punti noleggio nelle più rinomate località di montagna del nostro Paese e un servizio completo, personalizzato e offerto con la passione di chi ha lo sport nel cuore.

Il sogno di Erwin, Kurt e Gerhard – basato su attenzione al cliente, test e scelta dei materiali, cura maniacale nella preparazione degli sci e professionalità di ogni singolo gestore dei punti vendita – è ciò che ha portato i noleggi Rent and Go a diventare la realtà che è oggi: l’eccellenza al servizio degli sport di montagna.
