Name: Motoshare
Description:
MotoShare.in is an innovative marketplace that connects vehicle owners with individuals looking to rent bikes, cars, or motorbikes. The platform allows vehicle owners to list their vehicles for rent, and customers can easily browse and book them for short or long durations. With no hidden fees and a straightforward rental process, MotoShare.in is making vehicle rentals more accessible across various cities in India.

How MotoShare.in Works
MotoShare.in operates as a peer-to-peer rental platform:

Vehicle Owners: Owners list their vehicles (bikes, cars, motorbikes) on the platform, set rental prices, and manage availability.
Customers: Renters browse through available vehicles and book their preferred option for the desired duration.
Payments: Customers directly pay the vehicle owners, and MotoShare.in does not involve itself in the transaction process.
Validation: Renters are advised to validate the owner’s authenticity before completing the payment to ensure a smooth and safe rental experience.

Name: VERDAN
Description:
Een duurzaam vervoersnetwerk 
met elektrische voertuigen
en universele autonome laadstations.

Deelmobiliteit biedt gebruikers op korte termijn toegang tot een vervoermiddel wanneer dat nodig is, vermindert uitstoot en vergroot de bereikbaarheid van de regio.

Om dit doel te bereiken, is het plan om Verdan, het duurzame vervoersnetwerk met elektrische voertuigen en universele autonome laadstations, te creëren. Dit is een particulier initiatief op aanmoediging van de lokale overheid en is gebaseerd op ervaring in het aanbieden van elektrisch aangedreven voertuigen van de initiatiefnemers. 

De laadstations met voertuigen worden geplaatst op strategische plekken bij oa. toeristische hotspots, lokale ondernemers zoals vakantieparken, campings, horeca en andere bedrijven. Deze positionering zorgt ervoor dat er een verhoogde dekkingsgraad van vervoer binnen de regio ontstaat. 

De lokale ondernemers die deelnemen in het netwerk kunnen mede profiteren van ons verdienmodel door de laadstations te plaatsen. De laadstations staan op vrij toegankelijke grond en worden door de houder voorzien van stroom en internetverbinding. Daar tegenover verdient de laadstation houder een commissie op de verhuur van de voertuigen in het gehele netwerk en creëert men extra traffic van en naar de desbetreffende locatie.

De naam “Verdan” is overigens ontleend aan uitspraak in het Twents dialect “Verdan goan”, dat vrij vertaald  “Verder gaan”, “Nooit opgeven”en/of “doorgaan” betekent.

Name: Adventure Vending LLC - NV
Description:
Recreational vending company based in beauty Reno, NV.

As born and raised Northern Nevadans with a love for the great outdoors, we know firsthand the struggles of trying new adventures. Buying new equipment every time can quickly drain the wallet and take up precious space in the garage. Renting equipment can be a more affordable option, but it also has its limitations.

For example, stores often have limited hours, forcing you to choose between waiting until they open and reducing your available adventure time or renting the day before and paying extra to start early. And when the store closes at 4 pm, you’re left with the dilemma of either keeping the equipment overnight and paying more or rushing to return it before closing time.

But what if we could provide a more flexible solution? That’s where our idea of recreational vending comes in. We want to give people the opportunity to rent equipment on their own time, without the need for in-person interaction. With our unattended rental kiosks, you have access from dawn to dusk, giving you more time to spend on your adventures and less time worrying about logistics. Say goodbye to the limitations of traditional equipment rentals and hello to more freedom and flexibility with our recreational vending solution.

Our flagship product, the Polar Quest Cooling Vest, combines high-visibility safety gear with built-in fan technology, delivering powerful airflow and all-day comfort. From construction crews and roofers to landscapers, airport staff, and delivery teams — we’re here to help every worker #StayCoolFeelCool.

Our Mission
To keep people safe, cool, and confident while working or playing outdoors — even under the toughest conditions. Heat stress is a serious risk, and we’re on a quest to make cooling solutions accessible, practical, and fun.

Why Choose Polar Quest?
 Workplace Safety – Protect crews from heat stress and boost productivity.
 Smart Design – Lightweight, rechargeable, and built for tough jobs.
 Trusted by Workers – Loved by professionals across construction, logistics, utilities, and more.
 Community Driven – We’re building a global #StayCool community — led by our mascot, PQ Bear, who believes everyone deserves to work with a smile.

Let’s Connect
We partner with distributors, industrial suppliers, and safety managers to deliver cooling solutions where they’re needed most. Whether you’re outfitting a crew, managing procurement, or exploring sustainable PPE, let’s connect.

Name: Mountain Biking Moab
Description:
At MountainBikingMoab.com, we recognize Moab as a haven for mountain biking enthusiasts from all corners of the globe. With its iconic red rock formations, diverse terrain, and thrilling trails, Moab has rightfully earned its place as a dream destination for riders of every skill level. Whether you’re a seasoned pro seeking an adrenaline-fueled adventure or a novice rider looking to delve into the world of mountain biking, Moab holds boundless possibilities for everyone.

Our website is a comprehensive resource that strives to provide you with the most accurate, up-to-date, and insightful information about Moab’s trails, events, gear, and services. With meticulous attention to detail, we have compiled an extensive collection of trail guides, difficulty ratings, maps, and insider tips to help you plan your unforgettable biking escapades.

As fellow mountain biking enthusiasts, we fully understand the importance of reliable and firsthand knowledge when it comes to selecting the perfect trails. We have personally explored and reviewed numerous trails in Moab, ensuring that our recommendations are rooted in genuine experiences that will help you make the most of your time on the trails.

However, MountainBikingMoab.com is more than just a repository of trail information. We are committed to fostering a vibrant and supportive community of riders who share a common passion. Our blog showcases articles, stories, and expert advice from experienced riders, industry professionals, and local heroes eager to share their wisdom with you. Whether you’re seeking trail recommendations, technical riding tips, or insights into the latest gear and technology, our blog is a treasure trove of inspiration and knowledge.

We also firmly believe in the power of connection and collaboration. Our forum provides a platform for riders to engage in lively discussions, seek advice, share stories, and forge meaningful connections with fellow riders.

Name: HISO-CAR
Description:
In 2023, HISO brings the concept of "car sharing'' to Thailand, where car owners with idle cars can share their cars with their others to earn extra income. Those who need them can rent their favourite cars at a more affordable price. This could be for a special event, a treat for a loved one or something to tick off your bucket list. HISO Shared Car Rental will create a secure platform for you! In October, 2022, the concept of HISO Shared Car Rental attracted the attention of Venture Capital. HISO Shared Car Rental received angel investment of tens of millions of THB. This was a result of HISO’s clear vision and the huge demand in the market for this service.

In May 2023, HISO Car Rental will launch a win-win car rental platform built through the mobile Internet in Bangkok. Its car rental mode found a new way, using P2P (personal to individual) mode to bring car rental solutions to users and owners in Thailand. Through HISO Shared Car Rental, the tenants can rent the car they want more economically and conveniently. At the same time, the car owners can also trust their private cars to the HISO Shared Car Rental platform to earn additional income for something that would otherwise not be used. In 2023, Mavin, the founder of HISO Car Rental, took the lead in bringing the concept of "car sharing" to Thailand. Private car owners get extra income by sharing idle vehicles, while tenants rent their desired vehicles at a more economical price. In May 2023, HISO car Rental was officially launched, and it has now developed into the leading brand of P2P car rental in Thailand.

Name: Rentals On Your Left
Description:
ROYL (Rentals On Your Left) is a premier E-bike rental company based in West Michigan. We offer a unique and convenient way for individuals to explore the beauty of the region while enjoying the benefits of electric bikes. Our mission is to provide exceptional service, high-quality bikes, and unforgettable experiences for locals and visitors alike.
At ROYL, we understand the growing demand for sustainable and eco-friendly transportation options. Our fleet of fully insured E-bikes allows riders to effortlessly navigate through various terrains, whether it's cruising along scenic trails, exploring urban landscapes, or simply commuting around town. With the assistance of our electric bikes, riders can cover more ground, conquer hills with ease, and experience the joy of biking without the physical exertion.
One of the key differentiators of ROYL is our commitment to convenience. We take pride in our hassle-free rental process, ensuring that our bikes are delivered directly to our customers' desired location. Whether they are staying at a hotel, a short-term rental, or a new development, we cater to their needs, saving them time and effort. Additionally, our bikes come with all the necessary accessories, including locks, chargers, and informative tutorials, ensuring a seamless riding experience from start to finish.
Safety is a top priority at ROYL. We provide rider liability waivers and have worked closely with our legal team to develop a bulletproof waiver that offers peace of mind to both riders and our affiliate partners. Additionally, our bikes undergo professional inspections to ensure they are in excellent condition and ready for every adventure. 
In summary, ROYL is West Michigan's premier E-bike rental company, offering fully insured bikes, hassle-free delivery, and exceptional service. We aim to provide individuals with a convenient, eco-friendly, and unforgettable biking experience, allowing them to embrace the beauty of the region and create memories.

Verlässlichkeit: Mit einer erstklassigen Flotte und Standorten in über 150 Ländern bieten wir eine unübertroffene Verfügbarkeit und Bequemlichkeit.
Qualität: Unsere Fahrzeuge werden regelmäßig gewartet und gereinigt, um sicherzustellen, dass Sie ein komfortables und sicheres Fahrerlebnis genießen.
Flexibilität: Ob kurzfristige Anmietung oder Langzeitvermietung, bei Hertz finden Sie flexible Optionen, die sich an Ihre Bedürfnisse anpassen.
Kundenservice: Unser engagiertes Team steht Ihnen rund um die Uhr zur Verfügung, um Ihnen bei Fragen oder Anliegen zu helfen.
Innovation: Wir investieren in moderne Technologie, um Ihren Mietprozess so reibungslos wie möglich zu gestalten.
Bei Hertz dreht sich alles darum, Ihnen die Freiheit zu geben, die Welt zu erkunden. Lassen Sie uns Ihnen helfen, Ihre Reise unvergesslich zu machen. Buchen Sie noch heute Ihr Mietfahrzeug und erleben Sie erstklassige Mobilität mit Hertz!

Gia nhập KEIN, bạn sẽ có cơ hội làm việc trong một môi trường chuyên nghiệp, đề cao tinh thần chủ động và hiệu quả, nơi mà mọi nỗ lực và sáng tạo của bạn luôn được ghi nhận và trân trọng.

Name: Combi Vietnam
Description:
Combi là thương hiệu hàng đầu đến từ Nhật Bản, chuyên cung cấp các sản phẩm cao cấp dành cho mẹ và bé, giúp hành trình nuôi con trở nên dễ dàng và tràn đầy niềm vui. Với hơn 65 năm kinh nghiệm, Combi luôn tiên phong trong việc phát triển, sản xuất và cung cấp các sản phẩm chất lượng cao như xe đẩy, ghế ngồi ô tô và nhiều sản phẩm khác, đảm bảo sự an toàn, tiện lợi và thoải mái tối đa cho bé và cha mẹ.

Tại Việt Nam, Combi đã đồng hành cùng các gia đình suốt 16 năm, mang đến những sản phẩm chất lượng Nhật Bản, đáp ứng các tiêu chuẩn khắt khe về an toàn và thân thiện với trẻ nhỏ. Mỗi sản phẩm đều được nghiên cứu kỹ lưỡng, ứng dụng công nghệ tiên tiến nhằm hỗ trợ tối đa cho sự phát triển toàn diện của bé.

Không chỉ tập trung vào sản phẩm, Combi còn chú trọng đến việc hỗ trợ môi trường chăm sóc trẻ em thông qua các dịch vụ và sản phẩm hỗ trợ cho các bậc cha mẹ và trẻ nhỏ khi ra ngoài. Chúng tôi tin rằng, mỗi khoảnh khắc bên con đều quý giá, và Combi luôn sẵn sàng đồng hành cùng cha mẹ trong hành trình nuôi dưỡng yêu thương.

Name: ROD Moto
Description:
ROD is ontstaan uit de gedeelde passie voor motorrijden van Joost en Jeroen, neven en levenslange vrienden. Meer dan 10 jaar geleden ontstond het mantra "Ride Or Die" tussen hen telkens wanneer ze de weg op gingen, want voor hen betekent het echte leven pas iets wanneer ze op de motor zitten, genietend van de avonturen en ultieme vrijheid.

Onze missie is helder: mensen aanmoedigen om even los te komen van de digitale wereld en de echte wereld te ervaren op de rug van een motor. In een tijd waarin schermen vaak onze aandacht opeisen, willen we het verlangen naar avontuur en het karakteristieke geluid van ronkende motoren weer tot leven brengen.

Bij ROD geloven we in de gemeenschap die motorrijden kan creëren, in het delen van verhalen, in het ontmoeten van gelijkgestemde en in het vieren van de vrijheid op twee wielen. Dus, waar wacht je nog op? Stap op, voel de adrenaline en ontdek de wereld zoals je die nog nooit hebt gezien - op de weg met ROD, waar we leven voor het avontuur en rijden voor het leven.

Name: Brick+
Description:
LEGO is awesome. We’re obsessed.

From toddlers stacking their first towers to Adult Fans of LEGO (AFOLs) bringing dream sets to life, we believe building with LEGO sparks creativity, joy, and connection at any age.

But LEGO can be expensive—and let’s be honest, those incredible builds take up serious space. Not everyone has the budget (or the spare room) for a private LEGO gallery.

That’s where Brick+ comes in. We’re Sydney’s LEGO rental service—your chance to enjoy brilliant builds without the cost or clutter. For just $69, we deliver genuine LEGO sets straight to your door. Build, admire, and when you’re ready, dismantle and send them back in the very same box.

Why Brick+?
•	Save money: Access LEGO sets without paying retail prices.
•	Save space: Build big, enjoy, and return—no storage woes.
•	Better for the planet: We re-use sets, keeping bricks out of landfill and toy clutter out of your home.
•	Fun for all: teens, families, AFOLs, grandparents—anyone who loves LEGO can join the fun.

Brick+ is a small, family-run business started by LEGO lovers, for LEGO lovers. In a time when the cost of living is high, we wanted to make sure everyone can experience the magic of building, without barriers. 

At Brick+, our mission is simple: bring the joy of LEGO to more homes, more often, without the cost or clutter.

Name: Miracle Milkookies
Description:
Becoming a mother is one of the most life-altering transitions of a woman's life, yet in America there is very little support for mom in her early motherhood journey. Miracle Milkookies is changing the conversation around what support for new moms looks like. It’s our mission to give moms everywhere a boost. 

Products: We create products and resources that give mom the support she needs from the moment she first becomes a mom. We are the first company to offer Prenatal Kookies, packed full of the nutrients mom needs to nourish the growing baby in her womb. We are the first global direct-to-consumer lactation cookie subscription company - Giving moms around the world the chance to subscribe to weekly deliveries of handcrafted lactation cookies that boost milk supply, naturally. This Mother’s Day we are launching an exciting new Kookie product designed for national wholesale retail distribution. 

Resources: As a subscriber and member of our community, mom is given access to The Mom Insider  app, hosted by Miracle Milkookies. This membership platform gives mom direct access to a highly curated group of women's healthcare experts and the opportunity to participate in in-person events with other moms in their neighborhood and surrounding communities. Throughout every stage of motherhood, mom is invited to tune in to the Message from Mom podcast, to hear real conversations about everything moms might experience throughout pregnancy and postpartum life. The Miracle Milkookies blog, By Mom For Mom, is another resource new moms turn to for support and guidance.

Name: Apulia Outdoor
Description:
Apulia Outdoor è il partner ideale per chi desidera esplorare il Salento in modo autentico e sostenibile. Specializzati nel noleggio di biciclette di alta qualità e nell’organizzazione di esperienze outdoor, ci rivolgiamo a tutti coloro che vogliono vivere un’avventura unica, che si tratti di una pedalata rilassante lungo la costa o di un percorso impegnativo tra le campagne pugliesi.

Con punti di ritiro strategici a Lecce, Otranto e Melendugno, Apulia Outdoor offre una varietà di biciclette – dalle e-bike alle gravel, fino alle city bike – garantendo mezzi sicuri e adatti ad ogni tipo di percorso, incluse forcelle ammortizzate per i sentieri sterrati e cambi di qualità per le salite. Ogni noleggio include attrezzature complete, come caschi, kit di riparazione e borse laterali, per offrire ai nostri clienti un servizio senza pensieri.

Inoltre, organizziamo experience personalizzate che permettono di scoprire i luoghi più affascinanti della costa adriatica, i paesaggi di Roca Vecchia e le calette nascoste tra gli ulivi. La nostra proposta include anche tour in SUP, che si alternano agli itinerari in bicicletta, per godere del mare cristallino e della natura salentina da nuove prospettive.

 Nú bij KAV Autoverhuur & Shell Express (5 locaties)

Name: Rentable
Description:
We're a peer-to-peer rental service dedicated to changing the future of ownership. 

Rentable: Redefining Ownership

Forget buying everything you need. Rentable connects you with your neighbours to borrow what you want, when you want it. It's smarter, greener, and easier on your wallet.

Our Mission:

Shrink Your Environmental Footprint: Every item shared is one less produced. By tapping into your community's resources, you're actively reducing waste and fighting overconsumption. It's a simple way to make a real difference.

Keep More Cash in Your Pocket: Why shell out for stuff you'll barely use? Rentable lets you access what you need without the burden of ownership. No more gathering dust, no more buyer's remorse – just smart, on-demand access.

Why Rentable Makes Sense: 

Hassle-Free: Find everything from power tools to camping gear, all in your neighborhood. A few taps and you're set.

Peace of Mind: We've got your back with secure payments and optional insurance. Borrow with confidence.

Strengthen Your Community: Meet your neighbors, share resources, and build a more connected neighborhood. It's amazing what can happen when we share.

Join the Rentable Revolution

Rethink ownership. Embrace access. With Rentable, you're not just saving money – you're part of a movement towards a smarter, more sustainable future. Let's build it together, one rental at a time.

Not only are our boxes strong and durable they are reusable and that really matters in how we help to keep Melbourne on target in reducing our cardboard waste and increasing the use of recyclable products. Our boxes are all made from recycled plastic so we are literally reusing and repurposing plastics.

When you’ve finished your move, we collect the boxes and clean and sanitise them ready to be used again!

Name: VAN-IT Dijon | Agence Bourgogne
Description:
VAN-IT est depuis 2008 la première société de location de van aménagé en France avec des agences sur tout le territoire. L'agence de Dijon ouvre ses portes en 2025 !

VAN-IT propose la location de vans et fourgons aménagés de 2 à 5 places, tout équipés pour les vacances : 2 à 5 couchages, 2 feux de cuisson, évier + réserve d'eau, un vrai frigo et même le chauffage stationnaire pour l'hiver !

Véritable camping-cars mais avec les avantages d’un encombrement réduit, les vans aménagés permettent une liberté de déplacement totale grâce à leur faible hauteur (moins de 2m) et à leur facilité d’utilisation.

Louer un van est aujourd’hui un mode de voyage de plus en plus plébiscité par les français et VAN-IT en tant que pionnier dans le domaine s’efforce de toujours proposer de nouvelles gammes afin de satisfaire tous types de clients et tous les budgets. 

VAN-IT se diversifie aussi de la concurrence en proposant une gamme 5 places et en faisant ses propres aménagements.

Name: PT MARIFAH CIPTA BANGSA
Description:
Founded in 2021, PT Marifah Cipta Bangsa began as an e-commerce company specializing in the sale of fashion and lifestyle products, including socks, hijabs, jackets, and shoes. Through various brands on platforms like Shopee, Tokopedia, and TikTok Shop, the company successfully built a scalable retail business and achieved significant online traction.

In 2023, the company transformed into a tech-enabled rental and service provider, expanding its portfolio across transportation, technology, and creative industries. Today, PT Marifah Cipta Bangsa operates a fully digital ecosystem with the following core services:

Fleet management of 300+ rental units (cars and motorcycles)

iPhone 14 rental, Starlink internet rental, and outdoor equipment rental

Professional photography and videography services

140+ digital marketing and sales channels with a combined reach of over 200,000 followers

AI-powered WhatsApp chatbot for 24/7 customer interaction

1-minute digital booking system, streamlining the customer experience

The company also partners with major tech and mobility platforms such as Gojek, contributing vehicle supply under its Fleet Partner Program, and collaborates with vocational schools (SMKs) across Indonesia to support youth development in entrepreneurship and digital business.

With a strong commitment to innovation, accessibility, and sustainability, PT Marifah Cipta Bangsa continues to scale its impact as a forward-thinking leader in Indonesia’s rental and digital service economy.
Location: Jakarta Selatan,  Daerah Khusus Ibukota Jakarta

Name: Bricks Aholic | LEGO Verhuur & Events
Description:
Bij ons staat het plezier van LEGO bouwen voorop. Als een toonaangevend LEGO evenement- en verhuurbedrijf willen we dat mensen in Nederland, België en Duitsland echt kunnen genieten van de magie van LEGO. Daarom bieden we een breed assortiment LEGO bouwboxen die je kunt huren, zodat iedereen de kans krijgt om te bouwen en te creëren.

Maar we gaan verder dan alleen het verhuren van LEGO. We willen onze klanten volledig ondersteunen tijdens hun huurperiode en met hen meedenken. Je kunt ons zelfs inhuren om workshops, teambuildingactiviteiten of kinderfeestjes te organiseren, waarbij onze ervaren medewerkers de deelnemers begeleiden. Tijdens deze activiteiten leggen we de nadruk op het stimuleren van creativiteit, samenwerking en bovenal plezier!

Onze missie gaat verder dan alleen vermaak. We streven ernaar om een positieve impact te hebben op mensen, ongeacht hun leeftijd. We geloven dat LEGO bouwen niet alleen leuk is, maar ook een krachtig middel om vaardigheden te ontwikkelen, de verbeelding te stimuleren en bij te dragen aan persoonlijke groei.

Name: Ollo GmbH
Description:
Ollo definiert das Fahrradfahren für Kinder neu im Ollo Abo. Als erstes deutsches Subscription Modell für Kindermobilität bieten wir Eltern maximale Flexibilität und schonen gleichzeitig Ressourcen. 

Kinder wachsen schnell und ihre Bedürfnisse ändern sich ständig – mit dem Ollo Abo haben Eltern die Möglichkeit immer das richtige Produkt zu besitzen. Wachsen Kinder aus ihrem aktuellen Fahrrad heraus kann es ganz einfach in die nächste Größe umgetauscht werden. 

Als Teil der Circular Economy werden unsere selbst entwickelten hochwertigen Bikes so lange genutzt wie möglich  – das schont Ressourcen und hilft Abfälle zu vermeiden.  

Dabei sind alle Prozesse voll digital, einfach und kundenorientiert und damit bereit dafür, mit einer immer größer werdenden Zahl an Eltern und Kindern unsere Vision einer nachhaltigeren Nutzung von Kinderprodukten zu erfüllen.

Affidatevi a Lavanderie Monzesi per trasformare il modo in cui gestite la biancheria nel vostro B&B a Milano. Siamo pronti a superare ogni vostra aspettativa e a diventare il vostro partner ideale nel rendere il vostro spazio un'oasi di comfort e stile.

Name: NorthEastEvents
Description:
NorthEastEvents is a giant game rental business based out of Middlesbrough, England which supplies a large selection of games for a variety of different events from weddings to children's and adult parties at an affordable price. 

What is the purpose of NorthEastEvents?
Each year it is estimated that the world produces 300 million TONS of plastic, half of which is single use, this being nearly the equivalent of the entire population's weight combined. 

NortheastEvents aims to combat the single-use plastic industry one hire at a time by reusing our games for every hire. We see each hire as not only a success for ourselves but for the world as each hire represents another party/wedding not purchasing some piece of entertainment that they may not ever use after that day. 

What makes NortheastEvents unique?
NorthEastEvents is unique in many ways from its selection of life-sized games, marketing strategies, and even short-notice hiring which means NorthEastEvents unlike many other businesses can hire games on less than a day's notice.

The future goal for NorthEastEvents is to have each and every part of the entertainment industry reusable and sustainable and we hope you will help us in any way possible, this can even be by following our Facebook page at https://www.facebook.com/NorthEastEvents2021.

Name: GSD Models
Description: At GSD Models, our goal is simple…to be the premier diecast company representing the off-road community and its sponsors.  We feel this is directly accomplished by placing industry fabricators, builders, manufacturers, shops, and most importantly, off-road enthusiasts, at the center of everything we do.  Through licensing agreements with the industry’s most popular and respected companies, we strive to develop extremely detailed and realistic 1/18 scale models the off-road community can easily embrace.  By partnering with industry key stakeholders, we deliver models that are highly customizable and include scale, oscillating suspension.  By including these critical aspects we offer models that realistically represent the vehicles they build and drive every day. Name: Nomas Mēbeles
Description:
Mēbeļu noma dažādiem pasākumiem!

Mūsdienu steidzīgajā laikmetā, kad cenšamies visu paspēt uzreiz un paveikt vairākas lietas vienlaicīgi, arī dažādu pasākumu organizēšana ir viens no uzdevumiem, kurā mēģinām visu izdarīt vienkāršāk, ātrāk un, protams, finansiāli izdevīgāk.

Maltītes, telpas noformējums, apskaņošana, dalībnieki… ko mēs aizmirsām? Ak, jā, protams, nevienā pasākumā nav iespējams iztikt bez atbilstošām mēbelēm. Neatkarīgi no tā, vai organizē kāzas, semināru, konferenci vai kādu citu pasākumu, viesiem noteikti vajadzēs, kur apsēsties, uz kā novietot savas kafijas tasītes, glāzes un šķīvjus, kā arī, kur uzkarināt savas virsdrēbes. Tam visam nepieciešami kvalitatīvi galdi, krēsli un arī garderobes statīvi, un šo mēbeļu nomu par lieliskām cenām piedāvājam mēs, Nomas Mēbeles.

NomasMebeles.lv nodarbojas ar mēbeļu īri kāzām, semināriem, konferencēm, korporatīvajiem un dažādiem citiem oficiāliem un neoficiāliem pasākumiem. Mūsu piedāvājumā ir:

Trīs veidu krēslu noma – mūsu sortimentā ir gan ērti lietojami un ļoti ekonomiski saliekamie krēsli, gan arī klasiski un eleganti konferenču krēsli, gan arī konferenču krēsli ar paliktni, kur novietot papīrus pierakstiem.
Sešu veidu galdu noma – sortimentā ir divu veidu taisnstūra galdi, kā arī trīs veidu apaļie galdi un, protams, mūžīgā klasika – koka galdi dažādām vajadzībām un atšķirīgam cilvēku skaitam.
Galdautu un galda svārku noma skaistākam pasākumu noformējumam.
Garderobes statīvu noma–parūpējieties par pasākuma apmeklētāju ērtu un drošu virsdrēbju uzglabāšanu. Piedāvājam arī garderobes numurus un garderobista pakalpojumus. Mūsu rīcībā ir garderobes statīvi vairāk nekā 600 personu virsdrēbju novietošanai.

Name: Van der Linde Fietsenverhuur
Description:
Van der Linde Fietsenverhuur is al jarenlang een vertrouwd gezicht op Texel, en inmiddels ook een groeiende speler op het vasteland. Wat begon als een lokale verhuurder is uitgegroeid tot een breed mobiliteitsconcept met oog voor kwaliteit, gebruiksgemak en gastvrijheid.

Op Texel beschikken we over meerdere verhuurpunten verspreid over het eiland, met een vloot van duizenden fietsen. Van e-bikes tot bakfietsen, van tandems tot kinderfietsen bij Van der Linde draait alles om comfortabel, veilig en zorgeloos fietsen. Onze klanten profiteren van betrouwbare service, snelle hulp bij pech en het gemak van online reserveren via ons eigen platform.

Maar Van der Linde Fietsenverhuur is meer dan Texel alleen. Onder deze entiteit bouwen we aan een landelijk netwerk van aangesloten verhuurpartners in een franchise-achtige formule. Hierbij leveren wij:

    De fietsen en onderdelen

    De verhuursoftware (ontwikkeld in eigen huis)

    Logistieke en technische ondersteuning

    Marketing en boekingssystemen

    Én een bak aan kennis en ervaring

De lokale partner behoudt het ondernemerschap en is verantwoordelijk voor de uitvoering op locatie. Zo combineren we het beste van twee werelden: lokale betrokkenheid met de kracht van een professionele backoffice en slimme IT-oplossingen. We geloven in samen groeien, met korte lijnen, transparantie en wederzijds vertrouwen als basis.

Of je nu fietst over Texel of huurt bij één van onze partners op het vasteland bij Van der Linde Fietsenverhuur draait het altijd om kwaliteit op wielen. En we zijn nog lang niet uitgefietst.

Name: Miet-Boot.de
Description:
Der Online-Marktplatz Miet-Boot.de bietet eine unkomplizierte und effiziente Plattform, auf der Bootsinserate präsentiert werden können. Ganz gleich, um welche Art von Boot es sich handelt – sei es ein Segelboot, eine Motoryacht, ein Floß oder sogar ein Tretboot – hier finden potenzielle Mieter die perfekte Auswahl.

Miet-Boot.de stellt einen selbst entwickelten Online-Marktplatz dar, der bereits seit fünf Jahren erfolgreich auf dem Markt etabliert ist. Er bietet zahlreiche Funktionen für Anbieter. Sowohl Mieter als Endkunden als auch Anbieter profitieren von diesem Marktplatz. Von der Präsentation über das Marketing bis hin zur Vermittlung und Abwicklung agiert die Plattform als starker Partner mit umfassenden Features. Miet-Boot.de präsentiert ein vielseitiges Buchungssystem für Bootsverleihe, welches es Bootseigentümern ermöglicht, ihre Wasserfahrzeuge unkompliziert im Internet zu präsentieren. Durch ein WordPress Plugin ist es dem Anbieter ebenso möglich, seine Buchungen auf der eigenen Webseite abzuwickeln, dank der automatischen Synchronisation vom Plugin und dem Portal ist eine Doppelbuchung ausgeschlossen. Miet-Boot.de erreicht die Zielgruppe gezielt und sorgt für eine ansprechende Angebotsdarstellung, ohne dabei redundanten Inhalt zu generieren.

Name: Mini Monti | Heirloom Toy Rental
Description:
Mini Monti is a sustainable toy rental service for whānau in Ōtautahi / Greater ChCh.

We curate Play Collections using toys and Montessori materials sourced from local makers, small Kiwi businesses, and enterprises overseas that pay their artisans fairly for their beautiful work. 

We currently offer ten Play Collections:
 The Peacock: Open-ended Collection
 The Builder: First Blocks Collection
 The Mini: Montessori Collection (Age 1+)
 The Monti: Montessori Collection (Age 2+)
 The Sweet Tooth: Felt Food Collection
 The Panda Bear: Bamboo Building Connection
 The Naturalist: Nature Discovery Collection
 The Explorer: Heuristic Play Collection
 The Maestro: Percussion Collection
 The Ross Geller: Dino Discovery Collection

Keep an eye out for The Green Thumb: Mini Gardening Collection and The Bambini: Montessori Collection (Age 3+)... joining the whānau soon!

This little biz was founded to fill a gap in the ChCh market. While we are lucky to have lots of incredible toy libraries in the city, a sustainable plastic-free service like this one doesn't exist.

As well as offering a curated, detail-oriented service, we offer free door-to-door delivery on all bookings (with zero plastic waste) and handle all of the cleaning ourselves. This is to ensure our service is as simple and convenient as possible for busy parents, grandparents, homeschoolers + in-home educarers.

Interested in learning more? Please feel free to check us out at www.minimonti.nz and instagram.com/minimonti.nz

Name: La boum location
Description:
Bonjour à toutes et tous, 
NOUVEAU A MARSEILLE !!!
Vous êtes nostalgiques ? Vous kiffez les années 80 et les boums, les slows vous manquent avec le fameux quart d'heure américain ? (le moment où les femmes invitent pour danser un slow) 
Nous vous louons le matériel hifi de qualité (Enceintes, ampli, Nos platines vinyles sont toutes automatiques pour faciliter la manipulation) et également nous avons différents bacs de 45t (bac de 100) au choix avec la possibilité d'en louer plusieurs en option. Bientôt nouveauté pour les enfants  
Vous pourrez également faire connaître les boums à vos enfants, ados, jeunes adultes à l'occasion d'un anniversaire, d'une soirée entre copains-copines...
Et ça peut être une idée cadeau nous pouvons faire des bons cadeaux.
Et pour vous !!! Revivre vos plus belles années, pour des anniversaires, soirées entre amis, départ à la retraite, enterrement vie de garçon ou fille....
Nous proposons également une très belle salle à la Valbarelle (13011) neuve, équipée d'une sono et d'une magnifique scène pour des musiciens. Il y a un bar sur place à utiliser à votre guise 
Les packs sont soit à prendre dans le 12e (la fourragère) ou la possibilité d'être livrés et installés.
Les locations sont pour 24h ou 48h mais nous restons ouverts pour une durée plus importante. Nous aimerions également proposer nos services aux campings, résidences de tourisme pour des locations longues durées. Nous contacter 
Nous sommes intéressés pour travailler avec les CE n'hésitez pas à nous mettre en relation merci par avance.
On attend vos réactions et vos réservations avec impatience.
L'équipe La boum location
VIVE LES ANNEES 80 !!!

Name: PiEsseRent
Description:
Acquistare un’automobile, è diventato sempre più un impegno economico che poche persone si possono permettere. In particolare, se aggiungiamo al costo vero e proprio dell’automobile, anche le spese che si riferiscono alla manutenzione della vettura e alla sua assicurazione. 
Per chi vuole risparmiare, ma possedere sempre un’automobile nuova, il noleggio a lungo termine è sicuramente un’ottima soluzione, tra quelle proposte oggi dal mercato. Utilizzato da molti anni dalle Aziende di ogni dimensione, ora è sempre più utilizzato anche da privati e liberi professionisti.

CHE COSA E’ IL NOLEGGIO A LUNGO TERMINE
Il noleggio a lungo termine, è una sorta di abbonamento mensile, che vi offre la possibilità di possedere un’automobile senza doverla acquistare. Inoltre, all’interno di quest’abbonamento è inclusa l’assicurazione e la manutenzione della vettura.
La durata del noleggio a lungo termine, solitamente è compreso da 2 anni a un massimo di 5 anni. Quando si stipula il contratto, si stabilisce il canone mensile e gli extra che si desidera avere inclusi. Questo canone, varia in base ai chilometri che si prevede di percorrere, alla tipologia di vettura (Berlina, Ammiraglia, Utilitaria o Commerciale) e ovviamente dal modello che si sceglie. Più di prestigio e confortevole sarà la vostra autovettura, maggiore sarà il canone mensile che vi sarà addebitato ogni mese.

Name: GebrauchtGut
Description:
GebrauchtGut is a sustainable peer-to-peer rental platform designed to make everyday life more affordable, accessible, and environmentally responsible in Germany. We connect people who need items temporarily with those who already own them — enabling a smarter way to access products without the cost, waste, and storage challenges of traditional ownership.

Our mission is to empower communities to share more and waste less by building a trusted, safe, and user-friendly ecosystem for renting household items, electronics, tools, appliances, leisure equipment, and more.
We combine digital convenience, community-driven trust, and an integrated in-house insurance model to ensure secure and hassle-free exchanges.

 The Problem

Many people buy items they use only a few times — leading to high costs and unnecessary waste. Meanwhile, countless useful items sit unused in households. Current rental options are either expensive, inconvenient, or lack trust and protection between individual users.

 Our Solution

GebrauchtGut offers a seamless rental marketplace where:

Tenants can rent items affordably and quickly.

Landlords earn money from things they already own.

An integrated platform-managed insurance system protects both parties.

Smart verification, ratings, and secure payments ensure trust and safety.


 Value Proposition

Reduce unnecessary consumption and promote sustainability.

Earn passive income from idle household items.

Access anything you need — when you need it — at a fraction of the cost.

A digitally streamlined rental experience built around trust and simplicity.

Name: Share My Stuff
Description:
Are you tired of cluttered cabinets and overflowing storage spaces in your home? Do you wish you could reduce your plastic consumption and contribute towards a sustainable future? If so, renting household items may be the solution you’ve been looking for!

At ShareMyStuff, our vision is to reduce plastic consumption and encourage a culture of reusing items. The benefits of renting household items are numerous – from saving space at home to lowering the cost of ownership for both the owner and borrower. It’s a win-win situation for everyone involved, and it’s an eco-friendly choice that can help us save the planet.

In the UK alone, plastic consumption has been on the rise in recent years. In fact, according to a study by the Waste and Resources Action Programme, UK households generated 2.4 million tonnes of plastic waste in 2019. Despite the growing concern about plastic pollution, there are still no concrete steps being taken to curb this trend. That’s why it’s up to us, as individuals and businesses, to take action.

By renting items instead of buying new ones, we can reduce plastic waste and promote a more sustainable lifestyle. At ShareMyStuff, we offer a wide range of household items for rent – from kitchen appliances to garden tools – all at affordable prices. Our platform is designed to make renting easy and convenient, so you can save money and contribute to a cleaner, greener planet.

Join us in our mission to reduce plastic consumption and create a more sustainable future. Together, we can make a difference, one rental at a time.

Name: Borrow Nepal
Description:
The world of renting on your fingertip for free.

Borrow Nepal is Nepal's pioneer application which lets you lend, earn and borrow. This app is brought to you to serve our clients all over Nepal to have a single platform to lend and rent in various categories such as 
1. Talent and Services - Register yourself as a contractor, errand runner, freelancer, one-day server, task completer, etc, and earn.
2. Equipment - Post your equipment for other people to rent while you earn from them; post your books, kits, gear, furniture, art, etc, and earn. 
3. Rooms/ Spaces - Advertise your To-let apartments, lands, and rooms for free to have a renter/tenant so that you can earn from your unused spaces. 
4. Automobiles - Post your ads to lend your motor/non-motor vehicles to earn, lend your bicycle, motorbikes, cars, trucks, rickshaws, and others for others to find you.

How to use Borrow Nepal?
Download Borrow Nepal app and register yourself with your valid email account.

The major three characteristics of Borrow Nepal are:
1. Lend
- You can lend your Equipment, Talent/Services, Vehicles, and rooms/spaces to your desired customer on your mentioned charges such as per hour, per day, per month, and even per year. 

2. Earn
- Once you post your rental products in the app, wait for a call, text, or even email to negotiate and deal with a renter or borrower. 

3. Borrow
- The purpose of this app is to serve clients from Nepal to have a platform with the utmost visibility to rent any products imaginable for convenience and efficiency. 


Borrow Nepal is an app created for every people in Nepal to lower consumption and satisfy short-term and occasional needs and wants.

Scegliere il noleggio a lungo termine significa affidarsi a un servizio efficiente e senza sorprese, ideale per chi desidera una mobilità senza pensieri. Contattaci per scoprire come possiamo supportare le tue esigenze di trasporto.

Name: NN2C
Description:
NN2C does for things at home what ride sharing apps did for car ownership and food delivery apps did for take away.

Our mission is to save consumers money, time, space and stress.  In an increasingly environmentally conscious world, it is more important that ever to be aware of how much resources we use.  

But that doesn’t mean compromising on your lifestyle and ambitions. 

NN2C gives you the capacity to access stuff any time you need it at significantly lower prices than owning them while also being more environmentally sustainable.

How much stuff do you own at home that you never use?  How much money is tied up in those things at home that you bought for a single use?  

At NN2C, we think the answer to both questions is “too much” and we want to be the change that empowers people without compromising on quality or experience.

What sets Rialrent.it apart is our attention to detail and a tailored approach to customer experience. We don’t just rent cars — we deliver moments of beauty, adrenaline, and status. We operate all over the europe and offer flexible solutions, including delivery and pick-up services, daily or long-term rentals, and exclusive support for high-profile events and influencers.

Our team is made up of passionate professionals with deep knowledge of the luxury and automotive industries, and we’re constantly evolving to stay ahead of trends and client needs.
